# Map object design and functionality (2026-02-28 10:48Z)

_**User**_

I think one cool object to add would be a map. Interactable object that picks up when you interact with it, with spoken diaglog confirmation like "you picked up the map"

Ideally it would show an ASCII representation of the current map and which rooms are where--not the location of any items, just the rooms.

Pressing M would bring it up if you have it, or say "You haven't found the map to this area yet" via TTS dialog if you don't.

Any clarifying questions before you write the plan? As always the map should be represented by a distinct symbol with its own glowing rings etc, similar to how we've styled everything else...

---

_**Agent (model claude-4.5-opus-high-thinking, mode Agent)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user wants to add a map item to the game. Let me understand what they're asking for:

1. A new interactable object - a map pickup
2. When picked up, TTS dialogue says "you picked up the map"
3. Shows ASCII representation of the current map layout (rooms only, not items)
4. Press M to view if you have it
5. If you don't have it and press M, TTS says "You haven't found the map to this area yet"
6. Visual style should match other interactables (glowing rings, distinct symbol)

Before I write a plan, I should explore the codebase to understand:
1. How other interactables work (book pickups, batteries, etc.)
2. How the map generation works (to understand room structure)
3. How the dialogue/TTS system works
4. How the keyboard controls are set up
5. How the store manages inventory

Let me do some quick exploration to understand the patterns before asking any clarifying questions.</details></think>

---

Let me explore the codebase to understand the existing patterns for interactables, map generation, and dialogue before I ask any questions.

---

{ Scene } from 'phaser';\\\\\\\\nimport { EventBridge } from '../EventBridge';\\\\\\\\nimport { useGameStore } from '@/store/gameStore';\\\\\\\\nimport type { IControllablePlayer, Interactive } from '@/types/game';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst INTERACTION_BLOCKED_PHASES = ['dialogue', 'reading'] as const;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Global lock to prevent interaction processing during state transitions\\\\\\\\nlet interactionLocked = false;\\\\\\\\nexport function lockInteractions() { interactionLocked = true; }\\\\\\\\nexport function unlockInteractions() { interactionLocked = false; }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Proximity-based interaction detection.\\\\\\\\n * 'on' interactives (books, journals, transporter): prompt when standing ON the tile.\\\\\\\\n * 'adjacent' interactives (NPCs): prompt when standing next to the tile (solid, block movement).\\\\\\\\n * Emits interaction-available and interaction-triggered via EventBridge.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport class InteractionSystem {\\\\\\\\n  private scene: Scene | null = null;\\\\\\\\n  private player: IControllablePlayer | null = null;\\\\\\\\n  private interactives: Interactive[] = [];\\\\\\\\n  private currentInteractive: Interactive | null = null;\\\\\\\\n  private boundKeyHandler: ((e: KeyboardEvent) =&gt; void) | null = null;\\\\\\\\n  private isPlayerMoving = false;\\\\\\\\n  private lastInteractionTime = 0;\\\\\\\\n  private onPlayerMoving = () =&gt; { this.isPlayerMoving = true; };\\\\\\\\n  private onPlayerMoved = () =&gt; { this.isPlayerMoving = false; };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /** Register an interactive object (called when entities spawn) */\\\\\\\\n  register(interactive: Interactive): void {\\\\\\\\n    if (!this.interactives.some((i) =&gt; i.id === interactive.id)) {\\\\\\\\n      this.interactives.push(interactive);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  unregister(id: string): void {\\\\\\\\n    this.interactives = this.interactives.filter((i) =&gt; i.id !== id);\\\\\\\\n    if (this.currentInteractive?.id === id) {\\\\\\\\n      this.currentInteractive = null;\\\\\\\\n      EventBridge.emit('interaction-available', { type: '', label: undefined });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /** Attach to scene and player; call from ExploreScene.create() */\\\\\\\\n  attach(scene: Scene, player: IControllablePlayer): void {\\\\\\\\n    this.scene = scene;\\\\\\\\n    this.player = player;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    this.boundKeyHandler = (e: KeyboardEvent) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      if (e.repeat) return; // Ignore key repeats\\\\\\\\n      if (e.code === 'KeyE' || e.code === 'Space') {\\\\\\\\n        // Cooldown: ignore interactions within 300ms of last one\\\\\\\\n        const now = Date.now();\\\\\\\\n        if (now - this.lastInteractionTime &lt; 300) return;\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        const gamePhase = useGameStore.getState().session.gamePhase;\\\\\\\\n        if (INTERACTION_BLOCKED_PHASES.includes(gamePhase)) return;\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        // Auto-unlock if we're in exploring phase (safeguard against stuck lock)\\\\\\\\n        if (gamePhase === 'exploring') {\\\\\\\\n          interactionLocked = false;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        // Check global lock (only blocks during state transitions)\\\\\\\\n        if (interactionLocked) return;\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        const target = this.currentInteractive;\\\\\\\\n        if (!target) return;\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        this.lastInteractionTime = now;\\\\\\\\n        e.preventDefault();\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        // Lock interactions before emitting\\\\\\\\n        interactionLocked = true;\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        // Emit immediately - the cooldown and lock prevent double-triggering\\\\\\\\n        EventBridge.emit('interaction-triggered', {\\\\\\\\n          type: target.type,\\\\\\\\n          id: target.id,\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    scene.input.keyboard!.on('keydown', this.boundKeyHandler);\\\\\\\\n    EventBridge.on('player-moving', this.onPlayerMoving);\\\\\\\\n    EventBridge.on('player-moved', this.onPlayerMoved);\\\\\\\\n    scene.events.once('shutdown', () =&gt; this.detach());\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  detach(): void {\\\\\\\\n    EventBridge.off('player-moving', this.onPlayerMoving);\\\\\\\\n    EventBridge.off('player-moved', this.onPlayerMoved);\\\\\\\\n    if (this.scene?.input?.keyboard &amp;&amp; this.boundKeyHandler) {\\\\\\\\n      this.scene.input.keyboard.off('keydown', this.boundKeyHandler);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    this.scene = null;\\\\\\\\n    this.player = null;\\\\\\\\n    this.interactives = [];\\\\\\\\n    this.currentInteractive = null;\\\\\\\\n    this.boundKeyHandler = null;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /** Call every frame; only shows prompt when standing on the interactive tile */\\\\\\\\n  update(): void {\\\\\\\\n    if (!this.player) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (this.isPlayerMoving) {\\\\\\\\n      if (this.currentInteractive) {\\\\\\\\n        this.currentInteractive = null;\\\\\\\\n        EventBridge.emit('interaction-available', { type: '', label: undefined });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const pos = this.player.getGridPosition();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const found = this.interactives.find((i) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      const range = i.interactionRange ?? 'on';\\\\\\\\n      if (range === 'on') {\\\\\\\\n        return i.gridX === pos.x &amp;&amp; i.gridY === pos.y;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      // adjacent: manhattan distance 1 (standing next to NPC)\\\\\\\\n      const dx = Math.abs(pos.x - i.gridX);\\\\\\\\n      const dy = Math.abs(pos.y - i.gridY);\\\\\\\\n      return (dx === 1 &amp;&amp; dy === 0) || (dx === 0 &amp;&amp; dy === 1);\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (found &amp;&amp; found.id !== this.currentInteractive?.id) {\\\\\\\\n      this.currentInteractive = found;\\\\\\\\n      EventBridge.emit('interaction-available', {\\\\\\\\n        type: found.type,\\\\\\\\n        label: found.label,\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n    } else if (!found &amp;&amp; this.currentInteractive) {\\\\\\\\n      this.currentInteractive = null;\\\\\\\\n      EventBridge.emit('interaction-available', { type: '', label: undefined });\\\\\\\\n    } else if (found) {\\\\\\\\n      this.currentInteractive = found;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n * Core game types used across Phaser and the store.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport type { Scene } from 'phaser';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport interface Position {\\\\\\\\n  x: number;\\\\\\\\n  y: number;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport type Direction = 'up' | 'down' | 'left' | 'right';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** Interactive object types (register with Interaction system) */\\\\\\\\nexport type InteractiveType = 'book' | 'npc' | 'journal' | 'transporter' | 'battery';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport interface Interactive {\\\\\\\\n  id: string;\\\\\\\\n  type: InteractiveType;\\\\\\\\n  gridX: number;\\\\\\\\n  gridY: number;\\\\\\\\n  label?: string;\\\\\\\\n  /** 'on' = stand on tile (books, journals, transporter); 'adjacent' = stand next to (NPCs) */\\\\\\\\n  interactionRange?: 'on' | 'adjacent';\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** Context needed for movement collision checks */\\\\\\\\nexport interface MovementContext {\\\\\\\\n  wallLayer: Phaser.Tilemaps.TilemapLayer;\\\\\\\\n  mapWidth: number;\\\\\\\\n  mapHeight: number;\\\\\\\\n  /** Optional: tiles blocked by entities (e.g. NPCs). Returns coord strings \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"x,y\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\". */\\\\\\\\n  getBlockedTiles?: () =&gt; Set&lt;string&gt;;\\\\\\\\n  /** Optional: flooded tiles (passable but slow). Returns coord strings \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"x,y\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\". */\\\\\\\\n  getFloodedTiles?: () =&gt; Set&lt;string&gt;;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** Minimal player API required by MovementController and InteractionSystem */\\\\\\\\nexport interface IControllablePlayer {\\\\\\\\n  getGridPosition(): Position;\\\\\\\\n  setGridPosition(x: number, y: number): void;\\\\\\\\n  getDirection(): Direction;\\\\\\\\n  setDirection(dir: Direction): void;\\\\\\\\n  getSprite(): Phaser.GameObjects.GameObject;\\\\\\\\n  /** Pixel position for UI placement (same as container/sprite position) */\\\\\\\\n  getPixelPosition(): { x: number; y: number };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Interface for movement controllers. Allows swapping GridMovement\\\\\\\\n * for FreeMovementController later without changing Player.ts.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport interface MovementController {\\\\\\\\n  attach(\\\\\\\\n    scene: { EventEmitter } from 'events';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Typed event names for Phaser ↔ React communication.\\\\\\\\n * Add new events here as the game grows.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport type EventBridgeEvents = {\\\\\\\\n  'player-moving': void;\\\\\\\\n  'player-moved': { x: number; y: number };\\\\\\\\n  'interaction-available': { type: string; label?: string };\\\\\\\\n  'interaction-triggered': { type: string; id?: string };\\\\\\\\n  /** Emitted by GameContainer after successfully handling an interaction. ExploreScene uses this to destroy/remove. */\\\\\\\\n  'interactive-consumed': { type: string; id?: string };\\\\\\\\n  'book-found': { fragmentId: string; bookId: string };\\\\\\\\n  'battery-found': { batteryId: string };\\\\\\\\n  'battery-used': void;\\\\\\\\n  'npc-dialogue': { npcId: string; lines: string[] };\\\\\\\\n  'area-entered': { areaName: string };\\\\\\\\n  'close-dialogue': void;\\\\\\\\n  'open-inventory': void;\\\\\\\\n  /** Ship scene events */\\\\\\\\n  'beam-up-confirmed': void;\\\\\\\\n  'beam-down-requested': void;\\\\\\\\n  /** Dialogue choice selection */\\\\\\\\n  'dialogue-choice': { action: string };\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Singleton EventBridge for Phaser ↔ React communication.\\\\\\\\n * Phaser scenes emit events; React components subscribe and render UI.\\\\\\\\n * Never import React components into Phaser or vice versa.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nclass EventBridgeClass extends EventEmitter {\\\\\\\\n  emit&lt;K extends keyof EventBridgeEvents&gt;(\\\\\\\\n    event: K,\\\\\\\\n    ...args: EventBridgeEvents[K] extends void ? [] : [EventBridgeEvents[K]]\\\\\\\\n  ): boolean {\\\\\\\\n    return super.emit(event, ...(args as unknown[]));\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  on&lt;K extends keyof EventBridgeEvents&gt;(\\\\\\\\n    event: K,\\\\\\\\n    listener: (\\\\\\\\n      ...args: EventBridgeEvents[K] extends void ? [] : [EventBridgeEvents[K]]\\\\\\\\n    ) =&gt; void\\\\\\\\n  ): this {\\\\\\\\n    return super.on(event, listener as (...args: unknown[]) =&gt; void);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  once&lt;K extends keyof EventBridgeEvents&gt;(\\\\\\\\n    event: K,\\\\\\\\n    listener: (\\\\\\\\n      ...args: EventBridgeEvents[K] extends void ? [] : [EventBridgeEvents[K]]\\\\\\\\n    ) =&gt; void\\\\\\\\n  ): this {\\\\\\\\n    return super.once(event, listener as (...args: unknown[]) =&gt; void);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  off&lt;K extends keyof EventBridgeEvents&gt;(\\\\\\\\n    event: K,\\\\\\\\n    listener: (\\\\\\\\n      ...args: EventBridgeEvents[K] extends void ? [] : [EventBridgeEvents[K]]\\\\\\\\n    ) =&gt; void\\\\\\\\n  ): this {\\\\\\\\n    return super.off(event, listener as (...args: unknown[]) =&gt; void);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport const EventBridge = new EventBridgeClass();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":70}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"d0c2c68e-ddd1-471c-8582-cd566cf21319\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"828691cb-8295-4e62-85d7-8886b35493f5\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-28T11:40:34.427Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_bd94ff51-da07-4af8-bac7-36b44235c85\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_bd94ff51-da07-4af8-bac7-36b44235c85\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/utils/mapUtils.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/utils/mapUtils.ts\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/utils/mapUtils.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Helpers for map generation and tile math.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport { MAP_WIDTH, MAP_HEIGHT } from '@/config/gameConfig';\\\\\\\\nimport { TILE } from '@/data/tilesets';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport type MapLayer = number[][];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Create a static test tilemap for Phase 1.3.\\\\\\\\n * Ground layer, wall/collision layer, decoration layer.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function createStaticTestMap(): {\\\\\\\\n  ground: MapLayer;\\\\\\\\n  walls: MapLayer;\\\\\\\\n  decoration: MapLayer;\\\\\\\\n} {\\\\\\\\n  const ground: MapLayer = [];\\\\\\\\n  const walls: MapLayer = [];\\\\\\\\n  const decoration: MapLayer = [];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {\\\\\\\\n    ground.push([]);\\\\\\\\n    walls.push([]);\\\\\\\\n    decoration.push([]);\\\\\\\\n    for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {\\\\\\\\n      const isBorder =\\\\\\\\n        x === 0 || x === MAP_WIDTH - 1 || y === 0 || y === MAP_HEIGHT - 1;\\\\\\\\n      const inRoom1 =\\\\\\\\n        x &gt;= 5 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 15 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 5 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 15; // Library wing\\\\\\\\n      const inRoom2 =\\\\\\\\n        x &gt;= 30 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 45 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 10 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 25; // Reading room\\\\\\\\n      const inRoom3 = x &gt;= 20 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 35 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 35 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 45; // Courtyard\\\\\\\\n      const inCorridor =\\\\\\\\n        (x &gt;= 15 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 25 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 20 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 30) ||\\\\\\\\n        (y &gt;= 15 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 20 &amp;&amp; x &gt;= 15 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 45);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      if (isBorder) {\\\\\\\\n        walls[y][x] = TILE.WALL;\\\\\\\\n        ground[y][x] = TILE.DIRT;\\\\\\\\n      } else if (inRoom1 || inRoom2) {\\\\\\\\n        ground[y][x] = TILE.STONE_FLOOR;\\\\\\\\n        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;\\\\\\\\n      } else if (inRoom3) {\\\\\\\\n        ground[y][x] = TILE.GRASS;\\\\\\\\n        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;\\\\\\\\n      } else if (inCorridor) {\\\\\\\\n        ground[y][x] = TILE.FLOOR;\\\\\\\\n        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;\\\\\\\\n      } else {\\\\\\\\n        ground[y][x] = x % 3 === 0 ? TILE.GRASS : TILE.DIRT;\\\\\\\\n        walls[y][x] = Math.random() &lt; 0.03 ? TILE.RUBBLE : TILE.EMPTY;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      decoration[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;\\\\\\\\n      if (walls[y][x] === TILE.EMPTY &amp;&amp; Math.random() &lt; 0.02) {\\\\\\\\n        decoration[y][x] = Math.random() &lt; 0.5 ? TILE.VINE : TILE.DEBRIS;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Wall boundaries for rooms\\\\\\\\n  for (let x = 5; x &lt;= 15; x++) {\\\\\\\\n    walls[5][x] = TILE.WALL;\\\\\\\\n    walls[15][x] = TILE.WALL;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  for (let y = 5; y &lt;= 15; y++) {\\\\\\\\n    walls[y][5] = TILE.WALL;\\\\\\\\n    walls[y][15] = TILE.WALL;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  walls[10][5] = TILE.EMPTY; // Door\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  for (let x = 30; x &lt;= 45; x++) {\\\\\\\\n    walls[10][x] = TILE.WALL;\\\\\\\\n    walls[25][x] = TILE.WALL;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  for (let y = 10; y &lt;= 25; y++) {\\\\\\\\n    walls[y][30] = TILE.WALL;\\\\\\\\n    walls[y][45] = TILE.WALL;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  walls[17][30] = TILE.EMPTY; // Door\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return { ground, walls, decoration };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":86}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"2318a746-5d68-4457-ba3a-4b3910ff9549\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"a6609a28-abda-466a-b3aa-914fa40071f9\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-28T11:40:34.427Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"thinking\\\":{\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"signature\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":30}\",\"ae80a2ef-dc79-490b-b693-a019349a99d2\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"197e1b46-77fe-4b3d-ab36-ddb22fa1196b\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-28T11:40:34.427Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\\n## How Interactables Work in Starship Alexandria\\\\n\\\\n### 1. BookPickup Implementation\\\\n\\\\n&#96;BookPickup.ts&#96; is currently a stub. Interactables are implemented directly in &#96;ExploreScene.ts&#96; using Phaser Containers, not separate entity classes.\\\\n\\\\n### 2. Interaction System (&#96;src/game/systems/Interaction.ts&#96;)\\\\n\\\\nThe &#96;InteractionSystem&#96; class manages all interactables:\\\\n\\\\n**Key Methods:**\\\\n- &#96;register(interactive: Interactive)&#96; - Register an interactive object when it spawns\\\\n- &#96;unregister(id: string)&#96; - Remove an interactive when consumed\\\\n- &#96;attach(scene, player)&#96; - Attach to scene and set up keyboard handlers\\\\n- &#96;update()&#96; - Called every frame; detects proximity and emits &#96;interaction-available&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**Interaction Detection:**\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\n// Two interaction ranges:\\\\n- 'on' (default): Player must stand ON the tile (books, journals, transporter, batteries)\\\\n- 'adjacent': Player stands next to tile (NPCs - they block movement)\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**Keyboard Handling:**\\\\n- Listens for &#96;KeyE&#96; or &#96;Space&#96;\\\\n- Has 300ms cooldown to prevent double-triggers\\\\n- Checks &#96;gamePhase&#96; (blocks during 'dialogue' or 'reading')\\\\n- Uses global &#96;interactionLocked&#96; flag during state transitions\\\\n- Emits &#96;interaction-triggered&#96; event with &#96;{ type, id }&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 3. Interactive Type Definition (&#96;src/types/game.ts&#96;)\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\nexport type InteractiveType = 'book' | 'npc' | 'journal' | 'transporter' | 'battery';\\\\n\\\\nexport interface Interactive {\\\\n  id: string;\\\\n  type: InteractiveType;\\\\n  gridX: number;\\\\n  gridY: number;\\\\n  label?: string;\\\\n  interactionRange?: 'on' | 'adjacent'; // defaults to 'on'\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 4. Placement Pattern (&#96;ExploreScene.placeInteractives()&#96;)\\\\n\\\\n**Common Placement Rules:**\\\\n- All interactables use &#96;usedTiles&#96; Set to track occupied positions\\\\n- &#96;isAdjacentToUsed()&#96; prevents placing objects adjacent to each other, spawn, or transporter\\\\n- Only placed on &#96;reachableTiles&#96; (BFS from spawn, after rubble)\\\\n- Depth: All interactables use &#96;container.setDepth(5)&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**Placement Flow:**\\\\n1. Transporter placed at spawn first\\\\n2. Books: 2-4 per map, one per room, never in spawn room\\\\n3. NPCs: 1-2 per map, never in spawn room, never in same room as books\\\\n4. Journals: 1-2 per map, placed in any available room\\\\n5. Batteries: 1-2 per map, same rules as books\\\\n\\\\n**Example Placement Code (Books):**\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\n// Get available tiles in room\\\\nconst available = tiles.filter(\\\\n  (t) =&gt; !usedTiles.has(&#96;${t.x},${t.y}&#96;) &amp;&amp; \\\\n         !isAdjacentToUsed(t.x, t.y)\\\\n);\\\\n\\\\n// Pick random tile\\\\nconst tile = available[Math.floor(Math.random() * available.length)];\\\\nusedTiles.add(&#96;${tile.x},${tile.y}&#96;);\\\\n\\\\n// Calculate pixel position\\\\nconst px = tile.x * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;\\\\nconst py = tile.y * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 5. Visual Styling Pattern\\\\n\\\\nAll interactables follow a consistent visual pattern:\\\\n\\\\n**Standard Container Structure:**\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\nconst container = this.add.container(px, py);\\\\ncontainer.setDepth(5);\\\\n\\\\n// 1. Shadow (dark circle underneath)\\\\nconst shadow = this.add.graphics();\\\\nshadow.fillStyle(0x1a1a2e, 0.6);\\\\nshadow.fillCircle(0, 2, 14); // radius varies by type\\\\ncontainer.add(shadow);\\\\n\\\\n// 2. Dark outline ring (strong silhouette)\\\\nconst outlineRing = this.add.graphics();\\\\noutlineRing.lineStyle(5, 0x1a1a2e, 1);\\\\noutlineRing.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18); // radius varies\\\\ncontainer.add(outlineRing);\\\\n\\\\n// 3. Colored highlight ring (type-specific color)\\\\nconst ring = this.add.graphics();\\\\nring.lineStyle(3, COLOR, 1); // Color varies by type\\\\nring.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18);\\\\ncontainer.add(ring);\\\\n\\\\n// 4. Sprite\\\\nconst sprite = this.add.sprite(0, 0, 'sprite-key');\\\\ncontainer.add(sprite);\\\\n\\\\n// 5. Pulse animation\\\\nthis.tweens.add({\\\\n  targets: container,\\\\n  scale: 1.08, // varies: 1.05-1.08\\\\n  duration: 900, // varies: 900-1200ms\\\\n  yoyo: true,\\\\n  repeat: -1,\\\\n  ease: 'Sine.easeInOut',\\\\n});\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**Color Scheme by Type:**\\\\n- Books: &#96;0xd4af37&#96; (Gold) - radius 18, scale 1.08, duration 900ms\\\\n- Journals: &#96;0xb8860b&#96; (Dark goldenrod) - radius 16, scale 1.05, duration 1200ms\\\\n- Batteries: &#96;0x5cb85c&#96; (Green) - radius 18, scale 1.06, duration 950ms\\\\n- Transporter: &#96;0x5cb3ff&#96; (Electric blue) - radius 18, scale 1.06, duration 1000ms\\\\n- NPCs: &#96;0xe8a838&#96; (Warm amber) - radius 18, scale 1.06, duration 1100ms\\\\n  - Also has torchlight glow: &#96;0xff9944&#96; (0.25 alpha, radius 28) + &#96;0xffcc66&#96; (0.15 alpha, radius 20)\\\\n\\\\n**Special Visual Features:**\\\\n- Books stay full brightness through fog (never dimmed)\\\\n- NPCs have warm torchlight glow (visual only, doesn't extend FOV)\\\\n- Shadow offset: &#96;(0, 2)&#96; for depth\\\\n\\\\n### 6. Event Flow &amp; Consumption\\\\n\\\\n**Interaction Flow:**\\\\n1. Player stands on interactive tile → &#96;InteractionSystem.update()&#96; detects it\\\\n2. Emits &#96;interaction-available&#96; → React shows prompt\\\\n3. Player presses E/Space → Emits &#96;interaction-triggered&#96;\\\\n4. &#96;GameContainer.tsx&#96; handles &#96;interaction-triggered&#96;:\\\\n   - Updates game state (collectFragment, openDialogue, etc.)\\\\n   - Emits &#96;interactive-consumed&#96; after successful handling\\\\n5. &#96;ExploreScene&#96; listens to &#96;interactive-consumed&#96;:\\\\n   - Destroys container\\\\n   - Unregisters from InteractionSystem\\\\n   - Updates tracking maps\\\\n\\\\n**Important:** Never destroy on &#96;interaction-triggered&#96; - always wait for &#96;interactive-consumed&#96; to prevent race conditions.\\\\n\\\\n### 7. Adding a New Interactable Type\\\\n\\\\n**Steps:**\\\\n\\\\n1. **Add type to &#96;InteractiveType&#96;:**\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\n// src/types/game.ts\\\\nexport type InteractiveType = 'book' | 'npc' | 'journal' | 'transporter' | 'battery' | 'your-type';\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n2. **Create sprite in BootScene** (if needed):\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\n// Create procedural texture or load asset\\\\nconst sprite = this.add.graphics();\\\\n// ... draw sprite ...\\\\nsprite.generateTexture('your-type-pickup', width, height);\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n3. **Place in ExploreScene.placeInteractives():**\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\n// Follow the pattern:\\\\nconst container = this.add.container(px, py);\\\\ncontainer.setDepth(5);\\\\n// Add shadow, outline, colored ring, sprite\\\\n// Add pulse tween\\\\nthis.yourTypeContainers.set(id, container);\\\\nthis.interactionSystem.register({\\\\n  id: id,\\\\n  type: 'your-type',\\\\n  gridX: tile.x,\\\\n  gridY: tile.y,\\\\n  label: 'Your Label',\\\\n  interactionRange: 'on', // or 'adjacent'\\\\n});\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n4. **Handle in GameContainer.tsx:**\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\n// In onInteractionTriggered handler:\\\\nelse if (type === 'your-type' &amp;&amp; id) {\\\\n  // Do your logic\\\\n  EventBridge.emit('interactive-consumed', { type: 'your-type', id });\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n5. **Handle cleanup in ExploreScene:**\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\n// In onInteractiveConsumed handler:\\\\nelse if (type === 'your-type' &amp;&amp; id) {\\\\n  const container = this.yourTypeContainers.get(id);\\\\n  if (container) {\\\\n    container.destroy();\\\\n    this.yourTypeContainers.delete(id);\\\\n  }\\\\n  this.interactionSystem.unregister(id);\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n6. **Add container Map to ExploreScene:**\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\nprivate yourTypeContainers = new Map&lt;string, Phaser.GameObjects.Container&gt;();\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### Key Patterns Summary\\\\n\\\\n- Visual: Shadow → Outline → Colored Ring → Sprite → Pulse\\\\n- Placement: Track &#96;usedTiles&#96;, check &#96;isAdjacentToUsed()&#96;, only &#96;reachableTiles&#96;\\\\n- Registration: Register with &#96;InteractionSystem&#96; when placed\\\\n- Events: &#96;interaction-available&#96; → &#96;interaction-triggered&#96; → &#96;interactive-consumed&#96;\\\\n- Depth: All interactables at depth 5\\\\n- Cleanup: Destroy on &#96;interactive-consumed&#96;, not &#96;interaction-triggered&#96;\\\\n\\\\nThis pattern keeps interactables consistent and easy to extend.\\\"}\"},\"status\":\"completed\",\"context\":{\"composers\":[],\"selectedCommits\":[],\"selectedPullRequests\":[],\"selectedImages\":[],\"folderSelections\":[],\"fileSelections\":[],\"selections\":[],\"terminalSelections\":[],\"selectedDocs\":[],\"externalLinks\":[],\"cursorRules\":[],\"cursorCommands\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":[],\"subagentSelections\":[],\"browserSelections\":[],\"mentions\":{\"composers\":{},\"selectedCommits\":{},\"selectedPullRequests\":{},\"gitDiff\":[],\"gitDiffFromBranchToMain\":[],\"selectedImages\":{},\"folderSelections\":{},\"fileSelections\":{},\"terminalFiles\":{},\"selections\":{},\"terminalSelections\":{},\"selectedDocs\":{},\"externalLinks\":{},\"diffHistory\":[],\"cursorRules\":{},\"cursorCommands\":{},\"uiElementSelections\":[],\"consoleLogs\":[],\"ideEditorsState\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":{},\"subagentSelections\":{},\"browserSelections\":{}}},\"generatingBubbleIds\":[],\"isReadingLongFile\":false,\"codeBlockData\":{},\"originalFileStates\":{},\"newlyCreatedFiles\":[],\"newlyCreatedFolders\":[],\"createdAt\":1772275850277,\"hasChangedContext\":false,\"activeTabsShouldBeReactive\":true,\"capabilities\":[{\"type\":30,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":15,\"data\":{\"bubbleDataMap\":\"{}\"}},{\"type\":29,\"data\":{}}],\"name\":\"Interactable files.\\\\n\\\"}\",\"56804cbe-b62b-4ab5-b825-0a21953cec01\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"f5af61a2-e9f4-48dc-8488-e68646e0a648\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-28T11:40:34.432Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_c5976f66-b2a3-4148-8acb-c639b2f32bb\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_c5976f66-b2a3-4148-8acb-c639b2f32bb\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/game/systems/MapGenerator.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/game/systems/MapGenerator.ts\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/game/systems/MapGenerator.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * rot.js → Phaser tilemap pipeline.\\\\\\\\n * Uses ROT.Map.Digger for interior ruins; transforms to Phaser-compatible layers.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport { Map as ROTMap } from 'rot-js';\\\\\\\\nimport { MAP_WIDTH, MAP_HEIGHT } from '@/config/gameConfig';\\\\\\\\nimport { TILE } from '@/data/tilesets';\\\\\\\\nimport type { MapLayer } from '@/utils/mapUtils';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Default room names - used as fallback if content not loaded\\\\\\\\nconst DEFAULT_ROOM_NAMES = [\\\\\\\\n  'library wing',\\\\\\\\n  'reading room',\\\\\\\\n  'archives',\\\\\\\\n  'courtyard',\\\\\\\\n  'stacks',\\\\\\\\n  'rotunda',\\\\\\\\n  'vestibule',\\\\\\\\n  'study',\\\\\\\\n  'scriptorium',\\\\\\\\n] as const;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Cached room names loaded from content/rooms.yaml\\\\\\\\nlet _roomNamesCache: string[] | null = null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function setRoomNamesCache(names: string[]): void {\\\\\\\\n  _roomNamesCache = names;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function getRoomNames(): string[] {\\\\\\\\n  return _roomNamesCache ?? [...DEFAULT_ROOM_NAMES];\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport interface GeneratedRoom {\\\\\\\\n  name: string;\\\\\\\\n  x1: number;\\\\\\\\n  y1: number;\\\\\\\\n  x2: number;\\\\\\\\n  y2: number;\\\\\\\\n  centerX: number;\\\\\\\\n  centerY: number;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport interface GeneratedMap {\\\\\\\\n  ground: MapLayer;\\\\\\\\n  walls: MapLayer;\\\\\\\\n  decoration: MapLayer;\\\\\\\\n  rooms: GeneratedRoom[];\\\\\\\\n  spawnX: number;\\\\\\\\n  spawnY: number;\\\\\\\\n  /** Tile coords \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"x,y\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" that are flooded (passable but slow) */\\\\\\\\n  floodedTiles: Set&lt;string&gt;;\\\\\\\\n  /** Tile coords \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"x,y\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" reachable from spawn (BFS after rubble). Items only placed here. */\\\\\\\\n  reachableTiles: Set&lt;string&gt;;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Generate a procedural ruin map using ROT.Map.Digger.\\\\\\\\n * Returns ground, walls, decoration layers + room metadata.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function generateMap(): GeneratedMap {\\\\\\\\n  const ground: MapLayer = [];\\\\\\\\n  const walls: MapLayer = [];\\\\\\\\n  const decoration: MapLayer = [];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {\\\\\\\\n    ground.push(new Array(MAP_WIDTH).fill(TILE.DIRT));\\\\\\\\n    walls.push(new Array(MAP_WIDTH).fill(TILE.EMPTY));\\\\\\\\n    decoration.push(new Array(MAP_WIDTH).fill(TILE.EMPTY));\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const digger = new ROTMap.Digger(\\\\\\\\n    MAP_WIDTH,\\\\\\\\n    MAP_HEIGHT,\\\\\\\\n    {\\\\\\\\n      roomWidth: [5, 12],\\\\\\\\n      roomHeight: [4, 8],\\\\\\\\n      corridorLength: [2, 8],\\\\\\\\n      dugPercentage: 0.25,\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const rawMap: number[][] = [];\\\\\\\\n  for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {\\\\\\\\n    rawMap[x] = new Array(MAP_HEIGHT).fill(1);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  digger.create((x: number, y: number, value: number) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (x &gt;= 0 &amp;&amp; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 0 &amp;&amp; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT) {\\\\\\\\n      rawMap[x][y] = value;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const rooms = digger.getRooms() as Array&lt;{ _x1: number; _y1: number; _x2: number; _y2: number }&gt;;\\\\\\\\n  const roomNames = getRoomNames();\\\\\\\\n  const shuffledNames = [...roomNames].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const taggedRooms: GeneratedRoom[] = rooms.map((room, i) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const x1 = room._x1;\\\\\\\\n    const y1 = room._y1;\\\\\\\\n    const x2 = room._x2;\\\\\\\\n    const y2 = room._y2;\\\\\\\\n    const centerX = Math.floor((x1 + x2) / 2);\\\\\\\\n    const centerY = Math.floor((y1 + y2) / 2);\\\\\\\\n    return {\\\\\\\\n      name: shuffledNames[i % shuffledNames.length],\\\\\\\\n      x1,\\\\\\\\n      y1,\\\\\\\\n      x2,\\\\\\\\n      y2,\\\\\\\\n      centerX,\\\\\\\\n      centerY,\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const FLOOR_TILES = [TILE.FLOOR, TILE.STONE_FLOOR] as const;\\\\\\\\n  const WALL_TILES = [TILE.WALL, TILE.RUBBLE] as const;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {\\\\\\\\n    for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {\\\\\\\\n      const raw = rawMap[x][y];\\\\\\\\n      const isOpen = raw === 0 || raw === 2;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      if (isOpen) {\\\\\\\\n        const inRoom = taggedRooms.some(\\\\\\\\n          (r) =&gt; x &gt;= r.x1 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= r.x2 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= r.y1 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= r.y2\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        ground[y][x] =\\\\\\\\n          FLOOR_TILES[Math.floor(Math.random() * FLOOR_TILES.length)];\\\\\\\\n        if (inRoom) {\\\\\\\\n          ground[y][x] = TILE.STONE_FLOOR;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;\\\\\\\\n      } else {\\\\\\\\n        ground[y][x] = TILE.DIRT;\\\\\\\\n        walls[y][x] =\\\\\\\\n          WALL_TILES[Math.floor(Math.random() * WALL_TILES.length)];\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  for (let y = 1; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT - 1; y++) {\\\\\\\\n    for (let x = 1; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH - 1; x++) {\\\\\\\\n      if (walls[y][x] !== TILE.EMPTY) continue;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      const adjacentToWall = [\\\\\\\\n        [x - 1, y],\\\\\\\\n        [x + 1, y],\\\\\\\\n        [x, y - 1],\\\\\\\\n        [x, y + 1],\\\\\\\\n      ].some(([nx, ny]) =&gt; walls[ny]?.[nx] &amp;&amp; walls[ny][nx] !== TILE.EMPTY);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      if (adjacentToWall &amp;&amp; Math.random() &lt; 0.25) {\\\\\\\\n        decoration[y][x] = TILE.DEBRIS;\\\\\\\\n      } else if (\\\\\\\\n        !adjacentToWall &amp;&amp;\\\\\\\\n        ground[y][x] === TILE.STONE_FLOOR &amp;&amp;\\\\\\\\n        Math.random() &lt; 0.03\\\\\\\\n      ) {\\\\\\\\n        decoration[y][x] = TILE.VINE;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Corridor rubble: block some corridor tiles (distinct dark tiles, impassable)\\\\\\\\n  const floodedTiles = new Set&lt;string&gt;();\\\\\\\\n  const inRoom = (x: number, y: number) =&gt;\\\\\\\\n    taggedRooms.some((r) =&gt; x &gt;= r.x1 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= r.x2 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= r.y1 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= r.y2);\\\\\\\\n  const corridorTiles: { x: number; y: number }[] = [];\\\\\\\\n  for (let y = 1; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT - 1; y++) {\\\\\\\\n    for (let x = 1; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH - 1; x++) {\\\\\\\\n      if (walls[y][x] !== TILE.EMPTY) continue;\\\\\\\\n      if (!inRoom(x, y)) corridorTiles.push({ x, y });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  const rubbleCount = Math.min(5 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 8), corridorTiles.length);\\\\\\\\n  const shuffledCorridors = [...corridorTiles].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);\\\\\\\\n  for (let i = 0; i &lt; rubbleCount; i++) {\\\\\\\\n    const { x, y } = shuffledCorridors[i];\\\\\\\\n    walls[y][x] = TILE.RUBBLE;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Flooded tiles: passable but slow, visually distinct (blue-gray overlay)\\\\\\\\n  const floorTiles: { x: number; y: number }[] = [];\\\\\\\\n  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {\\\\\\\\n    for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {\\\\\\\\n      if (walls[y][x] === TILE.EMPTY &amp;&amp; decoration[y][x] === TILE.EMPTY) {\\\\\\\\n        floorTiles.push({ x, y });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  const floodCount = Math.min(3 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 5), floorTiles.length);\\\\\\\\n  const shuffledFloors = [...floorTiles].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);\\\\\\\\n  for (let i = 0; i &lt; floodCount; i++) {\\\\\\\\n    const { x, y } = shuffledFloors[i];\\\\\\\\n    decoration[y][x] = TILE.FLOODED;\\\\\\\\n    floodedTiles.add(&#96;${x},${y}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  let spawnX = Math.floor(MAP_WIDTH / 2);\\\\\\\\n  let spawnY = Math.floor(MAP_HEIGHT / 2);\\\\\\\\n  const spawnRoom = taggedRooms[0];\\\\\\\\n  if (spawnRoom &amp;&amp; walls[spawnRoom.centerY]?.[spawnRoom.centerX] === TILE.EMPTY) {\\\\\\\\n    spawnX = spawnRoom.centerX;\\\\\\\\n    spawnY = spawnRoom.centerY;\\\\\\\\n  } else if (spawnRoom) {\\\\\\\\n    for (let dy = -1; dy &lt;= 1; dy++) {\\\\\\\\n      for (let dx = -1; dx &lt;= 1; dx++) {\\\\\\\\n        const tx = spawnRoom.centerX + dx;\\\\\\\\n        const ty = spawnRoom.centerY + dy;\\\\\\\\n        if (walls[ty]?.[tx] === TILE.EMPTY) {\\\\\\\\n          spawnX = tx;\\\\\\\\n          spawnY = ty;\\\\\\\\n          break;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // BFS from spawn to get reachable tiles (after rubble) — items only placed here\\\\\\\\n  const reachableTiles = computeReachableTiles(walls, spawnX, spawnY);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return {\\\\\\\\n    ground,\\\\\\\\n    walls,\\\\\\\\n    decoration,\\\\\\\\n    rooms: taggedRooms,\\\\\\\\n    spawnX,\\\\\\\\n    spawnY,\\\\\\\\n    floodedTiles,\\\\\\\\n    reachableTiles,\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * BFS from (sx, sy) over walkable tiles (walls EMPTY). Returns coord strings \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"x,y\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nfunction computeReachableTiles(\\\\\\\\n  walls: MapLayer,\\\\\\\\n  sx: number,\\\\\\\\n  sy: number\\\\\\\\n): Set&lt;string&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  const reached = new Set&lt;string&gt;();\\\\\\\\n  const queue: { x: number; y: number }[] = [{ x: sx, y: sy }];\\\\\\\\n  reached.add(&#96;${sx},${sy}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  while (queue.length &gt; 0) {\\\\\\\\n    const { x, y } = queue.shift()!;\\\\\\\\n    for (const [dx, dy] of [[0, -1], [0, 1], [-1, 0], [1, 0]]) {\\\\\\\\n      const nx = x + dx;\\\\\\\\n      const ny = y + dy;\\\\\\\\n      if (nx &lt; 0 || nx &gt;= MAP_WIDTH || ny &lt; 0 || ny &gt;= MAP_HEIGHT) continue;\\\\\\\\n      if (walls[ny][nx] !== TILE.EMPTY) continue;\\\\\\\\n      const key = &#96;${nx},${ny}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n      if (reached.has(key)) continue;\\\\\\\\n      reached.add(key);\\\\\\\\n      queue.push({ x: nx, y: ny });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return reached;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Get open (walkable) tiles within a room. Excludes spawn if provided.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function getOpenTilesInRoom(\\\\\\\\n  rooms: GeneratedRoom[],\\\\\\\\n  walls: MapLayer,\\\\\\\\n  exclude?: { x: number; y: number }\\\\\\\\n): { room: GeneratedRoom; tiles: { x: number; y: number }[] }[] {\\\\\\\\n  return rooms\\\\\\\\n    .filter((r) =&gt; walls[r.centerY]?.[r.centerX] === TILE.EMPTY)\\\\\\\\n    .map((room) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      const tiles: { x: number; y: number }[] = [];\\\\\\\\n      for (let y = room.y1; y &lt;= room.y2; y++) {\\\\\\\\n        for (let x = room.x1; x &lt;= room.x2; x++) {\\\\\\\\n          if (walls[y]?.[x] === TILE.EMPTY &amp;&amp; !(exclude &amp;&amp; exclude.x === x &amp;&amp; exclude.y === y)) {\\\\\\\\n            tiles.push({ x, y });\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      return { room, tiles };\\\\\\\\n    })\\\\\\\\n    .filter(({ tiles }) =&gt; tiles.length &gt; 0);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Get room name at grid position, or null if not in a room.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function getRoomAt(\\\\\\\\n  rooms: GeneratedRoom[],\\\\\\\\n  x: number,\\\\\\\\n  y: number\\\\\\\\n): GeneratedRoom | null {\\\\\\\\n  return (\\\\\\\\n    rooms.find((r) =&gt; x &gt;= r.x1 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= r.x2 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= r.y1 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= r.y2) ?? null\\\\\\\\n Object placement (books, NPCs, items) happens on a separate layer\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":84},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"4. The Phaser scene loads the generated tilemap and places entities\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":85},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":86},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"### rot-js Imports\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":87},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- Map: &#96;import { Map } from 'rot-js'&#96; → &#96;new Map.Digger(...)&#96;\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":88},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- FOV: &#96;import { FOV } from 'rot-js'&#96; → &#96;new FOV.PreciseShadowcasting(lightPasses)&#96;\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":89},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- lightPasses(x, y) returns true when tile is walkable (not a wall)\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":90},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":91},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"### Player Entity (IControllablePlayer)\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":92},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- Uses a Phaser **Container** containing: highlight ring (Graphics) + sprite. Camera and GridMovement target the container via &#96;getSprite()&#96;.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":93},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- &#96;getPixelPosition()&#96; for UI placement (e.g. interaction prompt above player). Don't assume &#96;getSprite()&#96; has &#96;.x&#96;/&#96;.y&#96; — use &#96;getPixelPosition()&#96;.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":94},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- Highlight ring is for accessibility; keep it when iterating on player visuals.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":95},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":96},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"### Interaction System\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":97},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- Prompts show **only when standing ON the interactive tile**, not when adjacent and facing. Avoid re-adding \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"tile in front\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" logic — it caused false prompts.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":98},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- **Battery pickups**: Stored as inventory (&#96;spareBatteries&#96;). Press **B** to use one (restores 50%). No waste when picking up at high battery.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":99},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":100},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"### Depth Ordering (ExploreScene)\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":101},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- Ground 0, wall 1, decoration 2, wall outline 2.5, fog overlay 4, interactives 5, player 10, prompt 100. New visuals should slot into this order.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":102},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":103},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"### Book Pickup Visibility\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":104},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- Books and their gold rings stay **full brightness** through fog — never dim. Makes them easy to spot when in FOV. Subtle scale pulse (1 ↔ 1.08) draws the eye.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":105},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":106},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"### NPC Torchlight\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":107},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- NPCs have a warm glow (torchlight) when in view — they look lit, but don't extend FOV (would spoil exploration).\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":108},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":109},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"### Object Placement\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":110},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- **No adjacent placement**: Books, NPCs, journals, and batteries must not be placed on tiles directly adjacent (cardinal directions) to each other, the spawn, or the transporter. Filter candidates with &#96;!isAdjacentToUsed(x, y)&#96; before placing.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":111},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- **NPCs and books**: NPCs are never placed in the same room as a book fragment. Use &#96;roomsWithBooks&#96; to exclude those rooms from &#96;npcRoomData&#96;.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":112},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":113},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"### BootScene Procedural Textures\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":114},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- Placeholder sprites (player, book-pickup, transporter-pad, npc) are created with &#96;add.graphics()&#96;, drawn, &#96;generateTexture(key, w, h)&#96;, then &#96;destroy()&#96;. Replace with asset loading when tilesets are ready.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":115}]},\\\\\\\"score\\\\\\\":0.24021659791469574}]}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"92efc12d-c8c4-40eb-bdf7-657b36f2a18d\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"24699d42-9274-4fb6-95e7-666309b3fafc\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\ \"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_d27c1e4b-c95a-4e78-aeea-c68451b7f21\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_d27c1e4b-c95a-4e78-aeea-c68451b7f21\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/utils/mapUtils.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/utils/mapUtils.ts\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/utils/mapUtils.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Helpers for map generation and tile math.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport { MAP_WIDTH, MAP_HEIGHT } from '@/config/gameConfig';\\\\\\\\nimport { TILE } from '@/data/tilesets';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport type MapLayer = number[][];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Create a static test tilemap for Phase 1.3.\\\\\\\\n * Ground layer, wall/collision layer, decoration layer.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function createStaticTestMap(): {\\\\\\\\n  ground: MapLayer;\\\\\\\\n  walls: MapLayer;\\\\\\\\n  decoration: MapLayer;\\\\\\\\n} {\\\\\\\\n  const ground: MapLayer = [];\\\\\\\\n  const walls: MapLayer = [];\\\\\\\\n  const decoration: MapLayer = [];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {\\\\\\\\n    ground.push([]);\\\\\\\\n    walls.push([]);\\\\\\\\n    decoration.push([]);\\\\\\\\n    for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {\\\\\\\\n      const isBorder =\\\\\\\\n        x === 0 || x === MAP_WIDTH - 1 || y === 0 || y === MAP_HEIGHT - 1;\\\\\\\\n      const inRoom1 =\\\\\\\\n        x &gt;= 5 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 15 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 5 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 15; // Library wing\\\\\\\\n      const inRoom2 =\\\\\\\\n        x &gt;= 30 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 45 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 10 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 25; // Reading room\\\\\\\\n      const inRoom3 = x &gt;= 20 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 35 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 35 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 45; // Courtyard\\\\\\\\n      const inCorridor =\\\\\\\\n        (x &gt;= 15 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 25 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 20 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 30) ||\\\\\\\\n        (y &gt;= 15 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 20 &amp;&amp; x &gt;= 15 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 45);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      if (isBorder) {\\\\\\\\n        walls[y][x] = TILE.WALL;\\\\\\\\n        ground[y][x] = TILE.DIRT;\\\\\\\\n      } else if (inRoom1 || inRoom2) {\\\\\\\\n        ground[y][x] = TILE.STONE_FLOOR;\\\\\\\\n        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;\\\\\\\\n      } else if (inRoom3) {\\\\\\\\n        ground[y][x] = TILE.GRASS;\\\\\\\\n        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;\\\\\\\\n      } else if (inCorridor) {\\\\\\\\n        ground[y][x] = TILE.FLOOR;\\\\\\\\n        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;\\\\\\\\n      } else {\\\\\\\\n        ground[y][x] = x % 3 === 0 ? TILE.GRASS : TILE.DIRT;\\\\\\\\n        walls[y][x] = Math.random() &lt; 0.03 ? TILE.RUBBLE : TILE.EMPTY;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      decoration[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;\\\\\\\\n      if (walls[y][x] === TILE.EMPTY &amp;&amp; Math.random() &lt; 0.02) {\\\\\\\\n        decoration[y][x] = Math.random() &lt; 0.5 ? TILE.VINE : TILE.DEBRIS;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Wall boundaries for rooms\\\\\\\\n  for (let x = 5; x &lt;= 15; x++) {\\\\\\\\n    walls[5][x] = TILE.WALL;\\\\\\\\n    walls[15][x] = TILE.WALL;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  for (let y = 5; y &lt;= 15; y++) {\\\\\\\\n    walls[y][5] = TILE.WALL;\\\\\\\\n    walls[y][15] = TILE.WALL;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  walls[10][5] = TILE.EMPTY; // Door\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  for (let x = 30; x &lt;= 45; x++) {\\\\\\\\n    walls[10][x] = TILE.WALL;\\\\\\\\n    walls[25][x] = TILE.WALL;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n };\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":84},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"}\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":85,\\\\\\\"isSignature\\\\\\\":true}]},\\\\\\\"score\\\\\\\":0.23885834217071533}]}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"c2635770-8229-4091-9c2d-7bebe94f9f79\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"164cdd91-e2cf-4156-8b9a-bce7dbca5cbd\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-28T11:40:34.434Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"thinking\\\":{\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"signature\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":30}\",\"6f5962a1-63d9-41d1-b368-df7d667b0f2a\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"10b26f88-264b-4974-b4b2-a9483454c624\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-28T11:40:34.434Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\\n## Map Generation System Overview\\\\n\\\\n### 1. How MapGenerator Works\\\\n\\\\n**File**: &#96;/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/game/systems/MapGenerator.ts&#96;\\\\n\\\\nThe system uses **rot.js's &#96;ROT.Map.Digger&#96;** to generate procedural dungeon layouts:\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\nconst digger = new ROTMap.Digger(MAP_WIDTH, MAP_HEIGHT, {\\\\n  roomWidth: [5, 12],\\\\n  roomHeight: [4, 8],\\\\n  corridorLength: [2, 8],\\\\n  dugPercentage: 0.25,\\\\n});\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**Generation Process**:\\\\n1. Creates a &#96;rawMap&#96; 2D array (initially all walls = &#96;1&#96;)\\\\n2. Calls &#96;digger.create()&#96; callback that fills &#96;rawMap&#96; with values:\\\\n   - &#96;0&#96; or &#96;2&#96; = open/walkable (rooms + corridors)\\\\n   - &#96;1&#96; = wall\\\\n3. Extracts rooms via &#96;digger.getRooms()&#96; which returns room rectangles\\\\n4. Transforms raw data into Phaser-compatible tile layers (ground, walls, decoration)\\\\n5. Adds post-processing: rubble, flooding, decorations\\\\n\\\\n### 2. Room Data Structure\\\\n\\\\n**&#96;GeneratedRoom&#96; Interface**:\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\nexport interface GeneratedRoom {\\\\n  name: string;        // Assigned from room names cache (e.g., \\\\\\\"library wing\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"reading room\\\\\\\")\\\\n  x1: number;          // Left boundary (inclusive)\\\\n  y1: number;          // Top boundary (inclusive)\\\\n  x2: number;          // Right boundary (inclusive)\\\\n  y2: number;          // Bottom boundary (inclusive)\\\\n  centerX: number;     // Calculated center: Math.floor((x1 + x2) / 2)\\\\n  centerY: number;     // Calculated center: Math.floor((y1 + y2) / 2)\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**&#96;GeneratedMap&#96; Return Structure**:\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\nexport interface GeneratedMap {\\\\n  ground: MapLayer;           // 2D array: ground tile IDs per [y][x]\\\\n  walls: MapLayer;            // 2D array: wall tile IDs per [y][x] (TILE.EMPTY = walkable)\\\\n  decoration: MapLayer;        // 2D array: decoration tile IDs per [y][x]\\\\n  rooms: GeneratedRoom[];     // Array of all generated rooms\\\\n  spawnX: number;              // Player spawn X coordinate\\\\n  spawnY: number;              // Player spawn Y coordinate\\\\n  floodedTiles: Set&lt;string&gt;;  // Set of \\\\\\\"x,y\\\\\\\" strings for flooded tiles\\\\n  reachableTiles: Set&lt;string&gt;; // Set of \\\\\\\"x,y\\\\\\\" strings reachable from spawn (BFS)\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**Note**: Room connections/corridors are not explicitly tracked. Corridors are tiles where:\\\\n- &#96;rawMap[x][y] === 0 || rawMap[x][y] === 2&#96; (open)\\\\n- NOT within any room's &#96;(x1..x2, y1..y2)&#96; bounds\\\\n\\\\n### 3. Key Methods for Accessing Room Information\\\\n\\\\n**Get room at a specific position**:\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\nexport function getRoomAt(\\\\n  rooms: GeneratedRoom[],\\\\n  x: number,\\\\n  y: number\\\\n): GeneratedRoom | null\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\nReturns the room containing &#96;(x, y)&#96;, or &#96;null&#96; if in a corridor.\\\\n\\\\n**Get all open tiles within rooms**:\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\nexport function getOpenTilesInRoom(\\\\n  rooms: GeneratedRoom[],\\\\n  walls: MapLayer,\\\\n  exclude?: { x: number; y: number }\\\\n): { room: GeneratedRoom; tiles: { x: number; y: number }[] }[]\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\nReturns an array of &#96;{ room, tiles }&#96; objects with walkable tiles per room (excluding walls and optional exclude position).\\\\n\\\\n### 4. ASCII-Compatible Room Layout Information\\\\n\\\\nFor ASCII output, you can use:\\\\n\\\\n**Raw map data** (not directly exposed, but can be reconstructed):\\\\n- &#96;walls[y][x] === TILE.EMPTY&#96; = walkable/open\\\\n- &#96;walls[y][x] !== TILE.EMPTY&#96; = wall/rubble\\\\n\\\\n**Room boundaries**:\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\n// Check if a tile is in a room\\\\nfunction isInRoom(x: number, y: number, rooms: GeneratedRoom[]): boolean {\\\\n  return rooms.some(r =&gt; x &gt;= r.x1 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= r.x2 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= r.y1 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= r.y2);\\\\n}\\\\n\\\\n// Get room dimensions\\\\nconst width = room.x2 - room.x1 + 1;\\\\nconst height = room.y2 - room.y1 + 1;\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**Example ASCII conversion**:\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\nfunction toASCII(mapData: GeneratedMap): string {\\\\n  let output = '';\\\\n  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {\\\\n    for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {\\\\n      const isWalkable = mapData.walls[y][x] === TILE.EMPTY;\\\\n      const room = getRoomAt(mapData.rooms, x, y);\\\\n      \\\\n      if (!isWalkable) {\\\\n        output += '#'; // Wall\\\\n      } else if (room) {\\\\n        output += '.'; // Room floor\\\\n      } else {\\\\n        output += ','; // Corridor\\\\n      }\\\\n    }\\\\n    output += '\\\\\\\\n';\\\\n  }\\\\n  return output;\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### Configuration Constants\\\\n\\\\n**File**: &#96;/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/config/gameConfig.ts&#96;\\\\n- &#96;MAP_WIDTH = 50&#96; tiles\\\\n- &#96;MAP_HEIGHT = 50&#96; tiles\\\\n- &#96;TILE_SIZE = 32&#96; pixels\\\\n\\\\n### Usage Example (from ExploreScene.ts)\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\nconst mapData = generateMap();\\\\nconst { rooms, walls, spawnX, spawnY } = mapData;\\\\n\\\\n// Find room at player position\\\\nconst currentRoom = getRoomAt(rooms, playerX, playerY);\\\\n\\\\n// Get all rooms with open tiles (for placing items)\\\\nconst roomData = getOpenTilesInRoom(rooms, walls, { x: spawnX, y: spawnY });\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\nThe system doesn't expose explicit room connections, but connectivity can be inferred from the &#96;reachableTiles&#96; Set (BFS from spawn) or by analyzing the &#96;walls&#96; layer for walkable paths between rooms.\\\"}\"},\"status\":\"completed\",\"context\":{\"composers\":[],\"selectedCommits\":[],\"selectedPullRequests\":[],\"selectedImages\":[],\"folderSelections\":[],\"fileSelections\":[],\"selections\":[],\"terminalSelections\":[],\"selectedDocs\":[],\"externalLinks\":[],\"cursorRules\":[],\"cursorCommands\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":[],\"subagentSelections\":[],\"browserSelections\":[],\"mentions\":{\"composers\":{},\"selectedCommits\":{},\"selectedPullRequests\":{},\"gitDiff\":[],\"gitDiffFromBranchToMain\":[],\"selectedImages\":{},\"folderSelections\":{},\"fileSelections\":{},\"terminalFiles\":{},\"selections\":{},\"terminalSelections\":{},\"selectedDocs\":{},\"externalLinks\":{},\"diffHistory\":[],\"cursorRules\":{},\"cursorCommands\":{},\"uiElementSelections\":[],\"consoleLogs\":[],\"ideEditorsState\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":{},\"subagentSelections\":{},\"browserSelections\":{}}},\"generatingBubbleIds\":[],\"isReadingLongFile\":false,\"codeBlockData\":{},\"originalFileStates\":{},\"newlyCreatedFiles\":[],\"newlyCreatedFolders\":[],\"createdAt\":1772275852394,\"hasChangedContext\":false,\"activeTabsShouldBeReactive\":true,\"capabilities\":[{\"type\":30,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":15,\"data\":{\"bubbleDataMap\":\"{}\"}},{\"type\":29,\"data\":{}}],\"name\":\"Map generation system MapGenerator.ts\",\"filesChangedCount\":0,\"subagentInfo\":{\"subagentType\":3,\"parentComposerId\":\"ae6f65f6-4f25-4665-a7d4-d885adb03a54\",\"conversationLengthAtSpawn\":0,\"additionalData\":{},\"subagentTypeName\":\"explore\",\"toolCallId\":\"toolu_01T8SUz9r3tbXpB1QVZDnGUd\"}}"
