patterns.\\\\n\\\"}\",\"6eb67ff5-b4b4-40ba-8e19-13520c705514\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"8c869777-7fce-4b2f-9fef-c39d03db07df\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-28T11:40:34.444Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_8e61460c-485b-43ea-b076-14f540d94e4\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_8e61460c-485b-43ea-b076-14f540d94e4\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/components/DialogueBox.tsx\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/components/DialogueBox.tsx\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/components/DialogueBox.tsx\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"'use client';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport { useGameStore } from '@/store/gameStore';\\\\\\\\nimport { EventBridge } from '@/game/EventBridge';\\\\\\\\nimport { speak, cancelSpeech } from '@/utils/speech';\\\\\\\\nimport { unlockInteractions } from '@/game/systems/Interaction';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Dialogue overlay. Renders lines one at a time.\\\\\\\\n * Advance with Space/Enter; close when dialogue ends.\\\\\\\\n * Lines with &#96;choices&#96; show selectable options (press indicated key).\\\\\\\\n * role=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialog\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" aria-modal=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"true\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" for accessibility.\\\\\\\\n * TTS reads each line aloud when shown.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport default function DialogueBox() {\\\\\\\\n  const currentDialogue = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.session.currentDialogue);\\\\\\\\n  const closeDialogue = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.actions.closeDialogue);\\\\\\\\n  const [lineIndex, setLineIndex] = useState(0);\\\\\\\\n  const openedAtRef = useRef&lt;number&gt;(0);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const lines = currentDialogue ?? [];\\\\\\\\n  const currentLine = lines[lineIndex];\\\\\\\\n  const isOpen = lines.length &gt; 0;\\\\\\\\n  const hasChoices = currentLine?.choices &amp;&amp; currentLine.choices.length &gt; 0;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const advance = useCallback(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const timeSinceOpen = Date.now() - openedAtRef.current;\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Ignore advances within 300ms of opening (prevents accidental instant close)\\\\\\\\n    if (timeSinceOpen &lt; 300) return;\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Don't advance with Space/Enter if current line has choices\\\\\\\\n    if (hasChoices) return;\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    if (lineIndex &lt; lines.length - 1) {\\\\\\\\n      setLineIndex((i) =&gt; i + 1);\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      cancelSpeech();\\\\\\\\n      closeDialogue();\\\\\\\\n      unlockInteractions();\\\\\\\\n      setLineIndex(0);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, [lineIndex, lines.length, closeDialogue, hasChoices]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const handleChoice = useCallback((action: string) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    cancelSpeech();\\\\\\\\n    closeDialogue();\\\\\\\\n    unlockInteractions();\\\\\\\\n    setLineIndex(0);\\\\\\\\n    EventBridge.emit('dialogue-choice', { action });\\\\\\\\n  }, [closeDialogue]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!isOpen) return;\\\\\\\\n    openedAtRef.current = Date.now();\\\\\\\\n    setLineIndex(0);\\\\\\\\n  }, [isOpen]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // TTS: speak current line when it changes (include choices)\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!isOpen || !currentLine) return;\\\\\\\\n    let text = currentLine.speaker\\\\\\\\n      ? &#96;${currentLine.speaker}: ${currentLine.text}&#96;\\\\\\\\n      : currentLine.text;\\\\\\\\n    if (currentLine.choices &amp;&amp; currentLine.choices.length &gt; 0) {\\\\\\\\n      const choiceText = currentLine.choices\\\\\\\\n        .map((c) =&gt; &#96;Press ${c.key.toUpperCase()} for ${c.label}&#96;)\\\\\\\\n        .join('. ');\\\\\\\\n      text += &#96;. ${choiceText}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    speak(text);\\\\\\\\n    return () =&gt; cancelSpeech();\\\\\\\\n  }, [isOpen, lineIndex, currentLine]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!isOpen) cancelSpeech();\\\\\\\\n  }, [isOpen]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!isOpen) return;\\\\\\\\n    const handleKey = (e: KeyboardEvent) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      if (e.repeat) return;\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      // Handle choice selection\\\\\\\\n      if (hasChoices &amp;&amp; currentLine?.choices) {\\\\\\\\n        const choice = currentLine.choices.find(\\\\\\\\n          (c) =&gt; c.key.toLowerCase() === e.key.toLowerCase()\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        if (choice) {\\\\\\\\n          e.preventDefault();\\\\\\\\n          handleChoice(choice.action);\\\\\\\\n          return;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      if (e.code === 'Space' || e.code === 'Enter') {\\\\\\\\n        e.preventDefault();\\\\\\\\n        advance();\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      if (e.code === 'Escape') {\\\\\\\\n        e.preventDefault();\\\\\\\\n        cancelSpeech();\\\\\\\\n        closeDialogue();\\\\\\\\n        unlockInteractions();\\\\\\\\n        setLineIndex(0);\\\\\\\\n        // Emit cancel action if there were choices\\\\\\\\n        if (hasChoices) {\\\\\\\\n          EventBridge.emit('dialogue-choice', { action: 'cancel' });\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKey);\\\\\\\\n    return () =&gt; window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKey);\\\\\\\\n  }, [isOpen, advance, closeDialogue, hasChoices, currentLine, handleChoice]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (!isOpen) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return (\\\\\\\\n    &lt;div\\\\\\\\n      role=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialog\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      aria-modal=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"true\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      aria-label=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Dialogue\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      aria-describedby=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialogue-text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialogue-box\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    &gt;\\\\\\\\n      &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialogue-box__inner\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;p id=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialogue-text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialogue-box__text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n          {currentLine?.speaker\\\\\\\\n            ? &#96;${currentLine.speaker}: ${currentLine.text}&#96;\\\\\\\\n            : (currentLine?.text ?? '')}\\\\\\\\n        &lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\n        {hasChoices &amp;&amp; currentLine?.choices ? (\\\\\\\\n          &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialogue-box__choices\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" role=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"group\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" aria-label=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Choices\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n            {currentLine.choices.map((choice) =&gt; (\\\\\\\\n              &lt;span key={choice.key} className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialogue-box__choice\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                [{choice.key.toUpperCase()}] {choice.label}\\\\\\\\n              &lt;/span&gt;\\\\\\\\n            ))}\\\\\\\\n          &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n        ) : (\\\\\\\\n          &lt;p className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialogue-box__hint\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" aria-hidden=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"true\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n            {lineIndex &lt; lines.length - 1\\\\\\\\n              ? 'Press Space or Enter to continue'\\\\\\\\n              : 'Press Space or Enter to close'}\\\\\\\\n          &lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\n        )}\\\\\\\\n      &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n    &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":152}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"2f9ca567-7235-4d6c-aee9-446d5fb2c06b\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"81bde55a-e622-48c5-bbe3-389798a9b781\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-28T11:40:34.444Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_296ccc45-f869-44cb-8c4a-e0bd9c6052a\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_296ccc45-f869-44cb-8c4a-e0bd9c6052a\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/utils/speech.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/utils/speech.ts\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/utils/speech.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Browser TTS via Web Speech API.\\\\\\\\n * TODO: Add settings toggle to enable/disable.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction getSynth(): SpeechSynthesis | null {\\\\\\\\n  if (typeof window === 'undefined') return null;\\\\\\\\n  return window.speechSynthesis;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function speak(text: string): void {\\\\\\\\n  const synth = getSynth();\\\\\\\\n  if (!synth || !text.trim()) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  synth.cancel();\\\\\\\\n  const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text.trim());\\\\\\\\n  utterance.rate = 0.95;\\\\\\\\n  utterance.pitch = 1;\\\\\\\\n 'interaction-triggered': { type: string; id?: string };\\\\\\\\n  /** Emitted by GameContainer after successfully handling an interaction. ExploreScene uses this to destroy/remove. */\\\\\\\\n  'interactive-consumed': { type: string; id?: string };\\\\\\\\n  'book-found': { fragmentId: string; bookId: string };\\\\\\\\n  'battery-found': { batteryId: string };\\\\\\\\n  'battery-used': void;\\\\\\\\n  'npc-dialogue': { npcId: string; lines: string[] };\\\\\\\\n  'area-entered': { areaName: string };\\\\\\\\n  'close-dialogue': void;\\\\\\\\n  'open-inventory': void;\\\\\\\\n  /** Ship scene events */\\\\\\\\n  'beam-up-confirmed': void;\\\\\\\\n  'beam-down-requested': void;\\\\\\\\n  /** Dialogue choice selection */\\\\\\\\n  'dialogue-choice': { action: string };\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Singleton EventBridge for Phaser ↔ React communication.\\\\\\\\n * Phaser scenes emit events; React components subscribe and render UI.\\\\\\\\n * Never import React components into Phaser or vice versa.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nclass EventBridgeClass extends EventEmitter {\\\\\\\\n  emit&lt;K extends keyof EventBridgeEvents&gt;(\\\\\\\\n    event: K,\\\\\\\\n    ...args: EventBridgeEvents[K] extends void ? [] : [EventBridgeEvents[K]]\\\\\\\\n  ): boolean {\\\\\\\\n    return super.emit(event, ...(args as unknown[]));\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  on&lt;K extends keyof EventBridgeEvents&gt;(\\\\\\\\n    event: K,\\\\\\\\n    listener: (\\\\\\\\n      ...args: EventBridgeEvents[K] extends void ? [] : [EventBridgeEvents[K]]\\\\\\\\n    ) =&gt; void\\\\\\\\n  ): this {\\\\\\\\n    return super.on(event, listener as (...args: unknown[]) =&gt; void);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  once&lt;K extends keyof EventBridgeEvents&gt;(\\\\\\\\n    event: K,\\\\\\\\n    listener: (\\\\\\\\n      ...args: EventBridgeEvents[K] extends void ? [] : [EventBridgeEvents[K]]\\\\\\\\n    ) =&gt; void\\\\\\\\n  ): this {\\\\\\\\n    return super.once(event, listener as (...args: unknown[]) =&gt; void);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  off&lt;K extends keyof EventBridgeEvents&gt;(\\\\\\\\n    event: K,\\\\\\\\n    listener: (\\\\\\\\n      ...args: EventBridgeEvents[K] extends void ? [] : [EventBridgeEvents[K]]\\\\\\\\n    ) =&gt; void\\\\\\\\n  ): this {\\\\\\\\n    return super.off(event, listener as (...args: unknown[]) =&gt; void);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport const EventBridge = new client';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport { useGameStore } from '@/store/gameStore';\\\\\\\\nimport { getBookCatalogSync, type Book } from '@/data/books';\\\\\\\\nimport { speak, cancelSpeech } from '@/utils/speech';\\\\\\\\nimport { unlockInteractions } from '@/game/systems/Interaction';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Reading a found book fragment. WCAG contrast for text.\\\\\\\\n * Close with Space/Enter. TTS reads the fragment aloud.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport default function BookDetail() {\\\\\\\\n  const currentBookFragment = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.session.currentBookFragment);\\\\\\\\n  const closeBook = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.actions.closeBook);\\\\\\\\n  const gamePhase = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.session.gamePhase);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const isOpen = gamePhase === 'reading' &amp;&amp; currentBookFragment !== null;\\\\\\\\n  const openedAtRef = useRef&lt;number&gt;(0);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Track when the book opens\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!isOpen) return;\\\\\\\\n    openedAtRef.current = Date.now();\\\\\\\\n  }, [isOpen]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // TTS: speak fragment text when opened\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!isOpen || !currentBookFragment) return;\\\\\\\\n    const intro = &#96;Reading ${currentBookFragment.label}.&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    speak(intro + ' ' + currentBookFragment.text);\\\\\\\\n    return () =&gt; cancelSpeech();\\\\\\\\n  }, [isOpen, currentBookFragment?.id]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!isOpen) cancelSpeech();\\\\\\\\n  }, [isOpen]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!isOpen) return;\\\\\\\\n    const handleKey = (e: KeyboardEvent) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      if (e.repeat) return; // Ignore key repeats\\\\\\\\n      // Ignore closes within 300ms of opening (prevents accidental instant close)\\\\\\\\n      if (Date.now() - openedAtRef.current &lt; 300) return;\\\\\\\\n      if (e.code === 'Space' || e.code === 'Enter' || e.code === 'Escape') {\\\\\\\\n        e.preventDefault();\\\\\\\\n        cancelSpeech();\\\\\\\\n        closeBook();\\\\\\\\n        unlockInteractions();\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKey);\\\\\\\\n    return () =&gt; window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKey);\\\\\\\\n  }, [isOpen, closeBook]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (!isOpen || !currentBookFragment) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  let book: Book | undefined;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const catalog = getBookCatalogSync();\\\\\\\\n    book = catalog.find((b: Book) =&gt; b.id === currentBookFragment.bookId);\\\\\\\\n  } catch {\\\\\\\\n    book = undefined;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return (\\\\\\\\n    &lt;article\\\\\\\\n      role=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialog\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      aria-modal=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"true\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      aria-label={&#96;Reading: ${currentBookFragment.label} from ${book?.title ?? 'Unknown'}&#96;}\\\\\\\\n      className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"book-detail\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    &gt;\\\\\\\\n      &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"book-detail__inner\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;header className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"book-detail__header\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n          &lt;h2 className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"book-detail__title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;{book?.title ?? 'Unknown'}&lt;/h2&gt;\\\\\\\\n          &lt;p className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"book-detail__meta\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n            {book?.author} — {currentBookFragment.label}\\\\\\\\n          &lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;/header&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"book-detail__text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n          {currentBookFragment.text.split('\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n').map((para, i) =&gt; (\\\\\\\\n            &lt;p key={i}&gt;{para}&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\n          ))}\\\\\\\\n        &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;p className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"book-detail__hint\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" aria-hidden=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"true\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n          Press Space, Enter, or Escape to close\\\\\\\\n        &lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\n      &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n    &lt;/article&gt;\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":92}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"23b26f89-f940-4b48-9598-57169195e28e\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"62909065-139d-4b54-b6c9-16f1ae339add\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\ ootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_e4d2e25b-d125-4da8-b3cd-86d30762b31\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_e4d2e25b-d125-4da8-b3cd-86d30762b31\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/game/systems/Interaction.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/game/systems/Interaction.ts\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/game/systems/Interaction.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import { Scene } from 'phaser';\\\\\\\\nimport { EventBridge } from '../EventBridge';\\\\\\\\nimport { useGameStore } from '@/store/gameStore';\\\\\\\\nimport type { IControllablePlayer, Interactive } from '@/types/game';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst INTERACTION_BLOCKED_PHASES = ['dialogue', 'reading'] as const;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Global lock to prevent interaction processing during state transitions\\\\\\\\nlet interactionLocked = false;\\\\\\\\nexport function lockInteractions() { interactionLocked = true; }\\\\\\\\nexport function unlockInteractions() { interactionLocked = false; }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Proximity-based interaction detection.\\\\\\\\n * 'on' interactives (books, journals, transporter): prompt when standing ON the tile.\\\\\\\\n * 'adjacent' interactives (NPCs): prompt when standing next to the tile (solid, block movement).\\\\\\\\n * Emits interaction-available and interaction-triggered via EventBridge.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport class InteractionSystem {\\\\\\\\n  private scene: Scene | null = null;\\\\\\\\n  private player: IControllablePlayer | null = null;\\\\\\\\n  private interactives: Interactive[] = [];\\\\\\\\n  private currentInteractive: Interactive | null = null;\\\\\\\\n  private boundKeyHandler: ((e: KeyboardEvent) =&gt; void) | null = null;\\\\\\\\n  private isPlayerMoving = false;\\\\\\\\n  private lastInteractionTime = 0;\\\\\\\\n  private onPlayerMoving = () =&gt; { this.isPlayerMoving = true; };\\\\\\\\n  private onPlayerMoved = () =&gt; { this.isPlayerMoving = false; };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /** Register an interactive object (called when entities spawn) */\\\\\\\\n  register(interactive: Interactive): void {\\\\\\\\n    if (!this.interactives.some((i) =&gt; i.id === interactive.id)) {\\\\\\\\n      this.interactives.push(interactive);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  unregister(id: string): void {\\\\\\\\n    this.interactives = this.interactives.filter((i) =&gt; i.id !== id);\\\\\\\\n    if (this.currentInteractive?.id === id) {\\\\\\\\n      this.currentInteractive = null;\\\\\\\\n      EventBridge.emit('interaction-available', { type: '', label: undefined });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /** Attach to scene and player; call from ExploreScene.create() */\\\\\\\\n  attach(scene: Scene, player: IControllablePlayer): void {\\\\\\\\n    this.scene = scene;\\\\\\\\n    this.player = player;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    this.boundKeyHandler = (e: KeyboardEvent) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      if (e.repeat) return; // Ignore key repeats\\\\\\\\n      if (e.code === 'KeyE' || e.code === 'Space') {\\\\\\\\n        // Cooldown: ignore interactions within 300ms of last one\\\\\\\\n        const now = Date.now();\\\\\\\\n        if (now - this.lastInteractionTime &lt; 300) return;\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        const gamePhase = useGameStore.getState().session.gamePhase;\\\\\\\\n        if (INTERACTION_BLOCKED_PHASES.includes(gamePhase)) return;\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        // Auto-unlock if we're in exploring phase (safeguard against stuck lock)\\\\\\\\n        if (gamePhase === 'exploring') {\\\\\\\\n          interactionLocked = false;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        // Check global lock (only blocks during state transitions)\\\\\\\\n        if (interactionLocked) return;\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        const target = this.currentInteractive;\\\\\\\\n        if (!target) return;\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        this.lastInteractionTime = now;\\\\\\\\n        e.preventDefault();\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        // Lock interactions before emitting\\\\\\\\n        interactionLocked = true;\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        // Emit immediately - the cooldown and lock prevent double-triggering\\\\\\\\n        EventBridge.emit('interaction-triggered', {\\\\\\\\n          type: target.type,\\\\\\\\n          id: target.id,\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    scene.input.keyboard!.on('keydown', this.boundKeyHandler);\\\\\\\\n    EventBridge.on('player-moving', this.onPlayerMoving);\\\\\\\\n    EventBridge.on('player-moved', this.onPlayerMoved);\\\\\\\\n    scene.events.once('shutdown', () =&gt; this.detach());\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  detach(): void {\\\\\\\\n    EventBridge.off('player-moving', this.onPlayerMoving);\\\\\\\\n    EventBridge.off('player-moved', this.onPlayerMoved);\\\\\\\\n    if (this.scene?.input?.keyboard &amp;&amp; this.boundKeyHandler) {\\\\\\\\n      this.scene.input.keyboard.off('keydown', this.boundKeyHandler);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    this.scene = null;\\\\\\\\n    this.player = null;\\\\\\\\n    this.interactives = [];\\\\\\\\n    this.currentInteractive = null;\\\\\\\\n    this.boundKeyHandler = null;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /** Call every frame; only shows prompt when standing on the interactive tile */\\\\\\\\n  update(): void {\\\\\\\\n    if (!this.player) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (this.isPlayerMoving) {\\\\\\\\n      if (this.currentInteractive) {\\\\\\\\n        this.currentInteractive = null;\\\\\\\\n        EventBridge.emit('interaction-available', { type: '', label: undefined });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const pos = this.player.getGridPosition();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const found = this.interactives.find((i) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      const range = i.interactionRange ?? 'on';\\\\\\\\n      if (range === 'on') {\\\\\\\\n        return i.gridX === pos.x &amp;&amp; i.gridY === pos.y;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      // adjacent: manhattan distance 1 (standing next to NPC)\\\\\\\\n      const dx = Math.abs(pos.x - i.gridX);\\\\\\\\n      const dy = Math.abs(pos.y - i.gridY);\\\\\\\\n      return (dx === 1 &amp;&amp; dy === 0) || (dx === 0 &amp;&amp; dy === 1);\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (found &amp;&amp; found.id !== this.currentInteractive?.id) {\\\\\\\\n      this.currentInteractive = found;\\\\\\\\n      EventBridge.emit('interaction-available', {\\\\\\\\n        type: found.type,\\\\\\\\n        label: found.label,\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n    } else if (!found &amp;&amp; this.currentInteractive) {\\\\\\\\n      this.currentInteractive = null;\\\\\\\\n      EventBridge.emit('interaction-available', { type: '', label: undefined });\\\\\\\\n    } else if (found) {\\\\\\\\n      this.currentInteractive = found;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":142}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"a6c6a970-7f53-4c7c-ba16-4c8bad3cb65a\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"1057324e-eca7-4357-b6d5-e33d967a774f\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-28T11:40:34.446Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"thinking\\\":{\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"signature\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":30}\",\"66cd615e-e99f-4cec-8ce2-efb1e080b1df\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"ff32973f-2243-483a-aebe-2f87f003ba1b\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-28T11:40:34.446Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\\n## Dialogue and TTS System Patterns\\\\n\\\\n### 1. **DialogueBox Component** (&#96;src/components/DialogueBox.tsx&#96;)\\\\n\\\\n**How it works:**\\\\n- Reads &#96;currentDialogue&#96; from the Zustand store (&#96;useGameStore&#96;)\\\\n- Renders lines one at a time, advancing with Space/Enter\\\\n- Automatically speaks each line via TTS when &#96;lineIndex&#96; or &#96;currentLine&#96; changes\\\\n- TTS includes speaker name if present: &#96;\\\\\\\"${speaker}: ${text}\\\\\\\"&#96;\\\\n- For choices, TTS reads: &#96;\\\\\\\"Press X for Option\\\\\\\"&#96; after the main text\\\\n\\\\n**Key pattern:**\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\n// TTS triggers automatically when dialogue opens or line changes\\\\nuseEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\n  if (!isOpen || !currentLine) return;\\\\n  let text = currentLine.speaker\\\\n    ? &#96;${currentLine.speaker}: ${currentLine.text}&#96;\\\\n    : currentLine.text;\\\\n  if (currentLine.choices) {\\\\n    text += &#96;. ${choiceText}&#96;;\\\\n  }\\\\n  speak(text);\\\\n  return () =&gt; cancelSpeech();\\\\n}, [isOpen, lineIndex, currentLine]);\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 2. **TTS/Speech System** (&#96;src/utils/speech.ts&#96;)\\\\n\\\\n**Simple wrapper:**\\\\n- Uses browser &#96;SpeechSynthesis&#96; API\\\\n- &#96;speak(text)&#96; cancels any current speech and starts new utterance\\\\n- &#96;cancelSpeech()&#96; stops all speech\\\\n- Rate: 0.95, Pitch: 1.0\\\\n- No settings toggle yet (TODO in code)\\\\n\\\\n### 3. **EventBridge Dialogue Events** (&#96;src/game/EventBridge.ts&#96;)\\\\n\\\\n**Event types:**\\\\n- &#96;'npc-dialogue'&#96; — defined but not used (NPCs go through &#96;interaction-triggered&#96; instead)\\\\n- &#96;'dialogue-choice'&#96; — emitted when player selects a choice\\\\n- &#96;'close-dialogue'&#96; — defined but not actively used\\\\n\\\\n**Note:** Dialogue is not triggered via EventBridge events. Instead, it's triggered by calling the store action &#96;openDialogue()&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n### 4. **Pattern for Triggering Spoken Dialogue**\\\\n\\\\n**The standard pattern:**\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\n// In GameContainer.tsx or anywhere with store access:\\\\nuseGameStore.getState().actions.openDialogue([\\\\n  { text: 'Your message here' }\\\\n]);\\\\n\\\\n// With speaker:\\\\nuseGameStore.getState().actions.openDialogue([\\\\n  { speaker: 'Martha', text: 'Hello there!' }\\\\n]);\\\\n\\\\n// Multiple lines (auto-advances):\\\\nuseGameStore.getState().actions.openDialogue([\\\\n  { text: 'First line' },\\\\n  { text: 'Second line' },\\\\n  { text: 'Third line' }\\\\n]);\\\\n\\\\n// With choices:\\\\nuseGameStore.getState().actions.openDialogue([\\\\n  { \\\\n    text: 'Choose an option:',\\\\n    choices: [\\\\n      { key: 'y', label: 'Yes', action: 'beam-up' },\\\\n      { key: 'n', label: 'No', action: 'stay' }\\\\n    ]\\\\n  }\\\\n]);\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**\\\\\\\"You picked up X\\\\\\\" confirmation pattern:**\\\\n\\\\n**Battery pickup** (shows dialogue):\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\n// GameContainer.tsx line 196-198\\\\nuseGameStore.getState().actions.openDialogue([\\\\n  { text: &#96;Battery collected! You now have ${batteryCount} spare ${batteryCount === 1 ? 'battery' : 'batteries'}. Press B to recharge your flashlight.&#96; }\\\\n]);\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**Book pickup** (opens BookDetail instead):\\\\n- Books don't show a \\\\\\\"picked up\\\\\\\" dialogue\\\\n- Instead, &#96;collectFragment()&#96; sets &#96;currentBookFragment&#96; and &#96;gamePhase: 'reading'&#96;\\\\n- &#96;BookDetail&#96; component automatically speaks: &#96;\\\\\\\"Reading {fragment.label}. {fragment.text}\\\\\\\"&#96;\\\\n- This is the spoken confirmation for books\\\\n\\\\n**Other examples:**\\\\n- Battery use confirmation (line 62-64)\\\\n- Info key (I) summary (line 129)\\\\n- NPC dialogue (line 174)\\\\n- Journal reading (line 182)\\\\n- Transporter dialogue (line 205)\\\\n\\\\n### 5. **Interaction Flow**\\\\n\\\\n1. Player presses E/Space on interactive tile\\\\n2. &#96;InteractionSystem&#96; emits &#96;'interaction-triggered'&#96; event\\\\n3. &#96;GameContainer&#96; listens and handles based on &#96;type&#96;:\\\\n   - &#96;'book'&#96; → &#96;collectFragment()&#96; → opens &#96;BookDetail&#96; (TTS in BookDetail)\\\\n   - &#96;'battery'&#96; → &#96;addBattery()&#96; → &#96;openDialogue()&#96; with confirmation\\\\n   - &#96;'npc'&#96; → &#96;openDialogue()&#96; with NPC lines\\\\n   - &#96;'journal'&#96; → &#96;openDialogue()&#96; with journal lines\\\\n   - &#96;'transporter'&#96; → &#96;openDialogue()&#96; with transporter dialogue\\\\n4. &#96;DialogueBox&#96; automatically speaks when &#96;currentDialogue&#96; changes\\\\n5. After state update, &#96;GameContainer&#96; emits &#96;'interactive-consumed'&#96; so Phaser can remove the object\\\\n\\\\n### Summary: Key Pattern for Spoken Dialogue\\\\n\\\\n**To trigger spoken dialogue:**\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\nuseGameStore.getState().actions.openDialogue([\\\\n  { text: 'Message to speak' }\\\\n]);\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**DialogueBox automatically:**\\\\n- Renders the dialogue\\\\n- Speaks it via TTS\\\\n- Handles keyboard navigation\\\\n- Cleans up TTS on close\\\\n\\\\n**No need to manually call &#96;speak()&#96;** — &#96;DialogueBox&#96; handles TTS automatically when dialogue opens or advances.\\\"}\"},\"status\":\"completed\",\"context\":{\"composers\":[],\"selectedCommits\":[],\"selectedPullRequests\":[],\"selectedImages\":[],\"folderSelections\":[],\"fileSelections\":[],\"selections\":[],\"terminalSelections\":[],\"selectedDocs\":[],\"externalLinks\":[],\"cursorRules\":[],\"cursorCommands\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":[],\"subagentSelections\":[],\"browserSelections\":[],\"mentions\":{\"composers\":{},\"selectedCommits\":{},\"selectedPullRequests\":{},\"gitDiff\":[],\"gitDiffFromBranchToMain\":[],\"selectedImages\":{},\"folderSelections\":{},\"fileSelections\":{},\"terminalFiles\":{},\"selections\":{},\"terminalSelections\":{},\"selectedDocs\":{},\"externalLinks\":{},\"diffHistory\":[],\"cursorRules\":{},\"cursorCommands\":{},\"uiElementSelections\":[],\"consoleLogs\":[],\"ideEditorsState\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":{},\"subagentSelections\":{},\"browserSelections\":{}}},\"generatingBubbleIds\":[],\"isReadingLongFile\":false,\"codeBlockData\":{},\"originalFileStates\":{},\"newlyCreatedFiles\":[],\"newlyCreatedFolders\":[],\"createdAt\":1772275854295,\"hasChangedContext\":false,\"activeTabsShouldBeReactive\":true,\"capabilities\":[{\"type\":30,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":15,\"data\":{\"bubbleDataMap\":\"{}\"}},{\"type\":29,\"data\":{}}],\"name\":\"Dialogue {
  "description": "Explore store and keyboard",
  "prompt": "Explore the game store and keyboard handling. I need to understand:\n\n1. How inventory items are stored in gameStore (src/store/gameStore.ts)\n2. * Store state types.\\\\\\\\n * Shape mirrors planned Convex schema for minimal refactor on migration.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport type { BookFragment } from './books';\\\\\\\\nimport type { Position } from './game';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport interface DialogueChoice {\\\\\\\\n  label: string;\\\\\\\\n  key: string; // keyboard key to press (e.g. 'y', 'n')\\\\\\\\n  action: string; // action identifier emitted via EventBridge\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport interface DialogueLine {\\\\\\\\n  speaker?: string;\\\\\\\\n  text: string;\\\\\\\\n  choices?: DialogueChoice[];\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport interface JournalEntry {\\\\\\\\n  id: string;\\\\\\\\n  title: string;\\\\\\\\n  text: string;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** Persistent state (saved to localStorage now, Convex tables later) */\\\\\\\\nexport interface PersistedState {\\\\\\\\n  player: PlayerState;\\\\\\\\n  library: BookFragment[];\\\\\\\\n  exploration: ExplorationState;\\\\\\\\n  /** Has the player seen the initial welcome to the ship? */\\\\\\\\n  hasSeenWelcome: boolean;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport interface PlayerState {\\\\\\\\n  id: string;\\\\\\\\n  name: string;\\\\\\\\n  position: Position;\\\\\\\\n  currentMapId: string;\\\\\\\\n  flashlightBattery: number; // 0–100, dims but never kills\\\\\\\\n  spareBatteries: number; // collected pickups; press B to use\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport interface ExplorationState {\\\\\\\\n  visitedMaps: string[];\\\\\\\\n  discoveredNPCs: string[];\\\\\\\\n  readJournals: string[];\\\\\\\\n  totalFragmentsFound: number;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** Session state (not persisted – local UI/session only) */\\\\\\\\nexport interface SessionState {\\\\\\\\n  currentDialogue: DialogueLine[] | null;\\\\\\\\n  currentJournal: JournalEntry | null;\\\\\\\\n  isReadingBook: boolean;\\\\\\\\n  currentBookFragment: BookFragment | null;\\\\\\\\n  gamePhase: GamePhase;\\\\\\\\n  /** Explored tile coords \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"x,y\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" — fog of war within session */\\\\\\\\n  exploredTiles: string[];\\\\\\\\n  /** Books on current map (reset each map) */\\\\\\\\n  booksOnThisMap: number;\\\\\\\\n  booksRemainingOnThisMap: number;\\\\\\\\n  /** Room names where books are placed this map (for NPC hints) */\\\\\\\\n  roomsWithBooksOnMap: string[];\\\\\\\\n  /** NPC id → room name mapping for current map (for dynamic dialogue) */\\\\\\\\n  npcRoomsOnMap: Record&lt;string, string&gt;;\\\\\\\\n  /** Total reachable tiles on current map (for discovery %). Discovery = FOV-touched tiles. */\\\\\\\\n  explorableTileCount: number;\\\\\\\\n  /** Library size when current expedition started (to calculate new fragments found) */\\\\\\\\n  fragmentsAtExpeditionStart: number;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport type GamePhase = 'exploring' | 'ship' | 'dialogue' | 'reading';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport interface GameState {\\\\\\\\n  player: PlayerState;\\\\\\\\n  library: BookFragment[];\\\\\\\\n  exploration: ExplorationState;\\\\\\\\n  hasSeenWelcome: boolean;\\\\\\\\n  session: SessionState;\\\\\\\\n  actions: GameActions;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport interface GameActions {\\\\\\\\n  movePlayer: (position: Position) =&gt; void;\\\\\\\\n  decrementFlashlight: () =&gt; void;\\\\\\\\n  restoreFlashlight: (amount: number) =&gt; void;\\\\\\\\n  setFlashlight: (amount: number) =&gt; void;\\\\\\\\n  addBattery: () =&gt; void;\\\\\\\\n  useBattery: () =&gt; boolean;\\\\\\\\n  collectFragment: (fragment: BookFragment) =&gt; void;\\\\\\\\n  markMapVisited: (mapId: string) =&gt; void;\\\\\\\\n  discoverNPC: (npcId: string) =&gt; void;\\\\\\\\n  readJournal: (journalId: string) =&gt; void;\\\\\\\\n  openDialogue: (lines: DialogueLine[]) =&gt; void;\\\\\\\\n  closeDialogue: () =&gt; void;\\\\\\\\n  closeBook: () =&gt; void;\\\\\\\\n  /** Open a collected fragment for reading (ship library) */\\\\\\\\n  openLibraryBook: (fragment: BookFragment) =&gt; void;\\\\\\\\n  beamToShip: () =&gt; void;\\\\\\\\n  beamToSurface: (mapId: string) =&gt; void;\\\\\\\\n  saveToLocalStorage: () =&gt; void;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":118}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"e4abf32d-2d2f-4061-b6a4-87e9180d0ab1\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"bbdf67f5-bea2-4dfe-8f5c-ea70e2c95135\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\" client';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport { useGameStore } from '@/store/gameStore';\\\\\\\\nimport { getBookCatalogSync, type Book, type FragmentDef } from '@/data/books';\\\\\\\\nimport { EventBridge } from '@/game/EventBridge';\\\\\\\\nimport type { BookFragment } from '@/types/books';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Library collection view for ShipScene.\\\\\\\\n * Shows collected book fragments organized by book title.\\\\\\\\n * Clicking a fragment opens BookDetail for reading.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport default function LibraryShelf() {\\\\\\\\n  const library = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.library);\\\\\\\\n  const gamePhase = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.session.gamePhase);\\\\\\\\n  const openLibraryBook = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.actions.openLibraryBook);\\\\\\\\n  const [selectedBookId, setSelectedBookId] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n  const shelfRef = useRef&lt;HTMLDivElement&gt;(null);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const isVisible = gamePhase === 'ship';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Keyboard navigation\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!isVisible) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const handleKey = (e: KeyboardEvent) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      if (e.repeat) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Space/Enter on ship to beam down\\\\\\\\n      if (e.code === 'Space' || e.code === 'Enter') {\\\\\\\\n        if (!selectedBookId) {\\\\\\\\n          e.preventDefault();\\\\\\\\n          EventBridge.emit('beam-down-requested');\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Escape to deselect book or beam down\\\\\\\\n      if (e.code === 'Escape') {\\\\\\\\n        if (selectedBookId) {\\\\\\\\n          e.preventDefault();\\\\\\\\n          setSelectedBookId(null);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKey);\\\\\\\\n    return () =&gt; window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKey);\\\\\\\\n  }, [isVisible, selectedBookId]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (!isVisible) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Build a map of collected fragments by book\\\\\\\\n  const collectedByBook = new Map&lt;string, BookFragment[]&gt;();\\\\\\\\n  library.forEach((frag) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const existing = collectedByBook.get(frag.bookId) || [];\\\\\\\\n    collectedByBook.set(frag.bookId, [...existing, frag]);\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Get books that have at least one collected fragment\\\\\\\\n  let bookCatalog: Book[] = [];\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    bookCatalog = getBookCatalogSync();\\\\\\\\n  } catch {\\\\\\\\n    bookCatalog = [];\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  const booksWithFragments = bookCatalog.filter(\\\\\\\\n    (book: Book) =&gt; collectedByBook.has(book.id)\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const handleFragmentClick = (fragment: BookFragment) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    openLibraryBook(fragment);\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const handleBookClick = (bookId: string) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    setSelectedBookId(selectedBookId === bookId ? null : bookId);\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const handleBeamDown = () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    EventBridge.emit('beam-down-requested');\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const handleNewGame = () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (window.confirm('Start a new game? This will erase all progress.')) {\\\\\\\\n      useGameStore.getState().actions.resetGame();\\\\\\\\n      // Reload to reinitialize Phaser with fresh state\\\\\\\\n      window.location.reload();\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const totalCollected = library.length;\\\\\\\\n  const totalAvailable = bookCatalog.reduce((sum: number, b: Book) =&gt; sum + b.fragments.length, 0);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return (\\\\\\\\n    &lt;section\\\\\\\\n      ref={shelfRef}\\\\\\\\n      className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      role=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"region\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      aria-label=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Library Collection\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    &gt;\\\\\\\\n      &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__content\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;header className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__header\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n          &lt;h2 className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;The Alexandria Archives&lt;/h2&gt;\\\\\\\\n          &lt;p className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__count\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n            {totalCollected} of {totalAvailable} fragments recovered\\\\\\\\n          &lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;/header&gt;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        {booksWithFragments.length === 0 ? (\\\\\\\\n          &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__empty\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n            &lt;p&gt;Your library awaits its first acquisitions.&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\n            &lt;p className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__hint\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n              Beam down to Earth to recover fragments of lost literature.\\\\\\\\n            &lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\n          &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n        ) : (\\\\\\\\n          &lt;nav aria-label=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Book collection\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n            &lt;ul className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__books\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" role=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"list\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n              {booksWithFragments.map((book: Book) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n                const collected = collectedByBook.get(book.id) || [];\\\\\\\\n                const sortedFragments = [...collected].sort(\\\\\\\\n                  (a, b) =&gt; a.order - b.order\\\\\\\\n                );\\\\\\\\n                const isExpanded = selectedBookId === book.id;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n                return (\\\\\\\\n                  &lt;li key={book.id} className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__book\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                    &lt;button\\\\\\\\n                      className={&#96;library-shelf__book-header ${isExpanded ? 'library-shelf__book-header--expanded' : ''}&#96;}\\\\\\\\n                      onClick={() =&gt; handleBookClick(book.id)}\\\\\\\\n                      aria-expanded={isExpanded}\\\\\\\\n                      aria-controls={&#96;book-fragments-${book.id}&#96;}\\\\\\\\n                    &gt;\\\\\\\\n                      &lt;span className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__book-title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                        {book.title}\\\\\\\\n                      &lt;/span&gt;\\\\\\\\n                      &lt;span className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__book-author\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                        {book.author}\\\\\\\\n                      &lt;/span&gt;\\\\\\\\n                      &lt;span className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__book-progress\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                        {collected.length}/{book.fragments.length}\\\\\\\\n                      &lt;/span&gt;\\\\\\\\n                    &lt;/button&gt;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n                    {isExpanded &amp;&amp; (\\\\\\\\n                      &lt;ul\\\\\\\\n                        id={&#96;book-fragments-${book.id}&#96;}\\\\\\\\n                        className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__fragments\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                        role=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"list\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                      &gt;\\\\\\\\n                        {book.fragments.map((fragDef: FragmentDef) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n                          const collected = sortedFragments.find(\\\\\\\\n                            (f) =&gt; f.id === fragDef.id\\\\\\\\n                          );\\\\\\\\n                          const isCollected = !!collected;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n                          return (\\\\\\\\n                            &lt;li\\\\\\\\n                              key={fragDef.id}\\\\\\\\n                              className={&#96;library-shelf__fragment ${isCollected ? 'library-shelf__fragment--collected' : 'library-shelf__fragment--missing'}&#96;}\\\\\\\\n                            &gt;\\\\\\\\n                              {isCollected ? (\\\\\\\\n                                &lt;button\\\\\\\\n                                  className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__fragment-btn\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                                  onClick={() =&gt; handleFragmentClick(collected)}\\\\\\\\n                                  aria-label={&#96;Read ${fragDef.label}&#96;}\\\\\\\\n                                &gt;\\\\\\\\n                                  &lt;span className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__fragment-check\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                                    ✓\\\\\\\\n                                  &lt;/span&gt;\\\\\\\\n                                  &lt;span className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__fragment-label\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                                    {fragDef.label}\\\\\\\\n                                  &lt;/span&gt;\\\\\\\\n                                &lt;/button&gt;\\\\\\\\n                              ) : (\\\\\\\\n                                &lt;span\\\\\\\\n                                  className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__fragment-placeholder\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n                                  aria-label={&#96;${fragDef.label} - not yet discovered&#96;}\\\\\\\\n                                &gt;\\\\\\\\n                                  &lt;span className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__fragment-missing\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                                    ?\\\\\\\\n                                  &lt;/span&gt;\\\\\\\\n                                  &lt;span className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__fragment-label\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                                    {fragDef.label}\\\\\\\\n                                  &lt;/span&gt;\\\\\\\\n                                &lt;/span&gt;\\\\\\\\n                              )}\\\\\\\\n                            &lt;/li&gt;\\\\\\\\n                          );\\\\\\\\n                        })}\\\\\\\\n                      &lt;/ul&gt;\\\\\\\\n                    )}\\\\\\\\n                  &lt;/li&gt;\\\\\\\\n                );\\\\\\\\n              })}\\\\\\\\n            &lt;/ul&gt;\\\\\\\\n          &lt;/nav&gt;\\\\\\\\n        )}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__actions\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n          &lt;button\\\\\\\\n            className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__beam-btn\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            onClick={handleBeamDown}\\\\\\\\n            aria-label=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Begin new expedition to Earth\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          &gt;\\\\\\\\n            New Expedition\\\\\\\\n          &lt;/button&gt;\\\\\\\\n          &lt;p className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__beam-hint\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n            Press Space or Enter to beam down\\\\\\\\n          &lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\n          &lt;button\\\\\\\\n            className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"library-shelf__new-game-btn\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            onClick={handleNewGame}\\\\\\\\n            aria-label=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Start a new game from the beginning\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          &gt;\\\\\\\\n            New Game\\\\\\\\n          &lt;/button&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n      &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n    &lt;/section&gt;\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":223}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"4cfae64e-9bfb-4b30-99f8-4bad6cbea662\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"f6197b8e-2b49-47e6-a017-3af8c5689c73\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-28T11:40:34.449Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_8deb4d1c-46e7-4c45-92de-582d74b1901\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_8deb4d1c-46e7-4c45-92de-582d74b1901\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/components/DialogueBox.tsx\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/components/DialogueBox.tsx\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/sethwilson/dev/starship-alexandria/src/components/DialogueBox.tsx\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"'use client';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport { useGameStore } from '@/store/gameStore';\\\\\\\\nimport { EventBridge } from '@/game/EventBridge';\\\\\\\\nimport { speak, cancelSpeech } from '@/utils/speech';\\\\\\\\nimport { unlockInteractions } from '@/game/systems/Interaction';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Dialogue overlay. Renders lines one at a time.\\\\\\\\n * Advance with Space/Enter; close when dialogue ends.\\\\\\\\n * Lines with &#96;choices&#96; show selectable options (press indicated key).\\\\\\\\n * role=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialog\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" aria-modal=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"true\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" for accessibility.\\\\\\\\n * TTS reads each line aloud when shown.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport default function DialogueBox() {\\\\\\\\n  const currentDialogue = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.session.currentDialogue);\\\\\\\\n  const closeDialogue = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.actions.closeDialogue);\\\\\\\\n  const [lineIndex, setLineIndex] = useState(0);\\\\\\\\n  const openedAtRef = useRef&lt;number&gt;(0);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const lines = currentDialogue ?? [];\\\\\\\\n  const currentLine = lines[lineIndex];\\\\\\\\n  const isOpen = lines.length &gt; 0;\\\\\\\\n  const hasChoices = currentLine?.choices &amp;&amp; currentLine.choices.length &gt; 0;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const advance = useCallback(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const timeSinceOpen = Date.now() - openedAtRef.current;\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Ignore advances within 300ms of opening (prevents accidental instant close)\\\\\\\\n    if (timeSinceOpen &lt; 300) return;\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Don't advance with Space/Enter if current line has choices\\\\\\\\n    if (hasChoices) return;\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    if (lineIndex &lt; lines.length - 1) {\\\\\\\\n      setLineIndex((i) =&gt; i + 1);\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      cancelSpeech();\\\\\\\\n      closeDialogue();\\\\\\\\n      unlockInteractions();\\\\\\\\n      setLineIndex(0);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, [lineIndex, lines.length, closeDialogue, hasChoices]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const handleChoice = useCallback((action: string) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    cancelSpeech();\\\\\\\\n    closeDialogue();\\\\\\\\n    unlockInteractions();\\\\\\\\n    setLineIndex(0);\\\\\\\\n    EventBridge.emit('dialogue-choice', { action });\\\\\\\\n  }, [closeDialogue]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!isOpen) return;\\\\\\\\n    openedAtRef.current = Date.now();\\\\\\\\n    setLineIndex(0);\\\\\\\\n  }, [isOpen]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // TTS: speak current line when it changes (include choices)\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!isOpen || !currentLine) return;\\\\\\\\n    let text = currentLine.speaker\\\\\\\\n      ? &#96;${currentLine.speaker}: ${currentLine.text}&#96;\\\\\\\\n      : currentLine.text;\\\\\\\\n    if (currentLine.choices &amp;&amp; currentLine.choices.length &gt; 0) {\\\\\\\\n      const choiceText = currentLine.choices\\\\\\\\n        .map((c) =&gt; &#96;Press ${c.key.toUpperCase()} for ${c.label}&#96;)\\\\\\\\n        .join('. ');\\\\\\\\n      text += &#96;. ${choiceText}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    speak(text);\\\\\\\\n    return () =&gt; cancelSpeech();\\\\\\\\n  }, [isOpen, lineIndex, currentLine]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!isOpen) cancelSpeech();\\\\\\\\n  }, [isOpen]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!isOpen) return;\\\\\\\\n    const handleKey = (e: KeyboardEvent) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      if (e.repeat) return;\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      // Handle choice selection\\\\\\\\n      if (hasChoices &amp;&amp; currentLine?.choices) {\\\\\\\\n        const choice = currentLine.choices.find(\\\\\\\\n          (c) =&gt; c.key.toLowerCase() === e.key.toLowerCase()\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        if (choice) {\\\\\\\\n          e.preventDefault();\\\\\\\\n          handleChoice(choice.action);\\\\\\\\n          return;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      if (e.code === 'Space' || e.code === 'Enter') {\\\\\\\\n        e.preventDefault();\\\\\\\\n        advance();\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      if (e.code === 'Escape') {\\\\\\\\n        e.preventDefault();\\\\\\\\n        cancelSpeech();\\\\\\\\n        closeDialogue();\\\\\\\\n        unlockInteractions();\\\\\\\\n        setLineIndex(0);\\\\\\\\n        // Emit cancel action if there were choices\\\\\\\\n        if (hasChoices) {\\\\\\\\n          EventBridge.emit('dialogue-choice', { action: 'cancel' });\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKey);\\\\\\\\n    return () =&gt; window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKey);\\\\\\\\n  }, [isOpen, advance, closeDialogue, hasChoices, currentLine, handleChoice]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (!isOpen) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return (\\\\\\\\n    &lt;div\\\\\\\\n      role=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialog\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      aria-modal=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"true\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      aria-label=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Dialogue\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      aria-describedby=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialogue-text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialogue-box\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    &gt;\\\\\\\\n      &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialogue-box__inner\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;p id=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialogue-text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialogue-box__text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n          {currentLine?.speaker\\\\\\\\n            ? &#96;${currentLine.speaker}: ${currentLine.text}&#96;\\\\\\\\n            : (currentLine?.text ?? '')}\\\\\\\\n        &lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\n        {hasChoices &amp;&amp; currentLine?.choices ? (\\\\\\\\n          &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialogue-box__choices\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" role=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"group\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" aria-label=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Choices\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n            {currentLine.choices.map((choice) =&gt; (\\\\\\\\n              &lt;span key={choice.key} className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialogue-box__choice\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n                [{choice.key.toUpperCase()}] {choice.label}\\\\\\\\n              &lt;/span&gt;\\\\\\\\n            ))}\\\\\\\\n          &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n        ) : (\\\\\\\\n          &lt;p className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialogue-box__hint\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" aria-hidden=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"true\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n            {lineIndex &lt; lines.length - 1\\\\\\\\n              ? 'Press Space or Enter to continue'\\\\\\\\n              : 'Press Space or Enter to close'}\\\\\\\\n          &lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\n        )}\\\\\\\\n      &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n    &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":152}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"8e0e9dd8-62cd-4318-b6e5-4a83a3851fe9\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"53f13ff1-aa76-4ce7-a75f-33f75660bf3c\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\ client';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport { useGameStore } from '@/store/gameStore';\\\\\\\\nimport { getBookCatalogSync, type Book } from '@/data/books';\\\\\\\\nimport { speak, cancelSpeech } from '@/utils/speech';\\\\\\\\nimport { unlockInteractions } from '@/game/systems/Interaction';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Reading a found book fragment. WCAG contrast for text.\\\\\\\\n * Close with Space/Enter. TTS reads the fragment aloud.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport default function BookDetail() {\\\\\\\\n  const currentBookFragment = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.session.currentBookFragment);\\\\\\\\n  const closeBook = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.actions.closeBook);\\\\\\\\n  const gamePhase = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.session.gamePhase);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const isOpen = gamePhase === 'reading' &amp;&amp; currentBookFragment !== null;\\\\\\\\n  const openedAtRef = useRef&lt;number&gt;(0);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Track when the book opens\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!isOpen) return;\\\\\\\\n    openedAtRef.current = Date.now();\\\\\\\\n  }, [isOpen]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // TTS: speak fragment text when opened\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!isOpen || !currentBookFragment) return;\\\\\\\\n    const intro = &#96;Reading ${currentBookFragment.label}.&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    speak(intro + ' ' + currentBookFragment.text);\\\\\\\\n    return () =&gt; cancelSpeech();\\\\\\\\n  }, [isOpen, currentBookFragment?.id]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!isOpen) cancelSpeech();\\\\\\\\n  }, [isOpen]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!isOpen) return;\\\\\\\\n    const handleKey = (e: KeyboardEvent) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      if (e.repeat) return; // Ignore key repeats\\\\\\\\n      // Ignore closes within 300ms of opening (prevents accidental instant close)\\\\\\\\n      if (Date.now() - openedAtRef.current &lt; 300) return;\\\\\\\\n      if (e.code === 'Space' || e.code === 'Enter' || e.code === 'Escape') {\\\\\\\\n        e.preventDefault();\\\\\\\\n        cancelSpeech();\\\\\\\\n        closeBook();\\\\\\\\n        unlockInteractions();\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKey);\\\\\\\\n    return () =&gt; window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKey);\\\\\\\\n  }, [isOpen, closeBook]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (!isOpen || !currentBookFragment) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  let book: Book | undefined;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const catalog = getBookCatalogSync();\\\\\\\\n    book = catalog.find((b: Book) =&gt; b.id === currentBookFragment.bookId);\\\\\\\\n  } catch {\\\\\\\\n    book = undefined;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return (\\\\\\\\n    &lt;article\\\\\\\\n      role=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dialog\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      aria-modal=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"true\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      aria-label={&#96;Reading: ${currentBookFragment.label} from ${book?.title ?? 'Unknown'}&#96;}\\\\\\\\n      className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"book-detail\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    &gt;\\\\\\\\n      &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"book-detail__inner\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;header className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"book-detail__header\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n          &lt;h2 className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"book-detail__title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;{book?.title ?? 'Unknown'}&lt;/h2&gt;\\\\\\\\n          &lt;p className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"book-detail__meta\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n            {book?.author} — {currentBookFragment.label}\\\\\\\\n          &lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;/header&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;div className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"book-detail__text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n          {currentBookFragment.text.split('\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n').map((para, i) =&gt; (\\\\\\\\n            &lt;p key={i}&gt;{para}&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\n          ))}\\\\\\\\n        &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;p className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"book-detail__hint\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" aria-hidden=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"true\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n          Press Space, Enter, or Escape to close\\\\\\\\n        &lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\n      &lt;/div&gt;\\\\\\\\n    &lt;/article&gt;\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":92}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"3040521c-e37e-4967-bbfc-a6e739ccdce9\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"2482156e-f581-4b67-8ad8-abddbc761f60\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\
